title: AI Visual Producer (Real Estate Media) – Part-Time Night Shift – $7 per Listing
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based real estate media company looking for a reliable tea
mber to generate AI-enhanced visual assets for property listing videos.



This is NOT a video editing role.



This position focuses on creating clean, realistic AI visuals such as:

• Blue skies

• Sunset exteriors

• Virtual staging

• Lifestyle elements (ex: kids playing in backyard)

• Simple creative transitions



The work is structured, repeatable, and we provide full training.



?



Schedule – Required Availability



You MUST be available on these Philippine Time days:



Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday

(This corresponds to Monday–Saturday evenings U.S. Eastern Time)



Work window:

• Assets are uploaded between 8:00–9:00 PM Eastern Time

• All AI assets must be completed by 11:00 PM Eastern Time



Some nights:

• 0 listings

• 1–2 listings

• Occasionally 3–4 listings



You must be available during this window even if there are zero listings.



?



Pay



• $7 USD per completed listing

• Paid bi-weekly via Wise

• We pay for ALL AI software and credits

• No personal subscriptions required



Reliable performance can lead to long-term work and increased volume.



?



Tools You Will Use



We use Higgsfield AI



You do NOT need prior experience with this tool.



We will:

• Provide training videos

• Provide exact prompts

• Provide clear instructions for every listing

• Pay for all credits and software



Your job is simply to follow instructions and generate clean, realistic visuals.



?



What You Will Do



For each listing, you will:



• Read structured shot instructions

• Generate blue sky replacements

• Create sunset exterior images

• Create virtual staging when needed

• Generate simple lifestyle shots

• Download and organize final files properly

• Mark project complete



Worst case: up to 10–11 AI images

Most listings require fewer.



This is detail-focused work, but it is very straightforward once trained.



?



Requirements



You must have:



• Fast and stable internet

• A reliable computer

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions exactly

• Availability during required hours

• Good English comprehension



Preferred but not required:

• Experience with AI tools

• Real estate media familiarity



?



Important



This role requires consistency.



You must:

• Be online during required hours

• Complete assignments before 11 PM Eastern

• Communicate quickly if questions arise



If you are often unavailable during those hours, this role will not work.



?



To Apply



Please answer:

 1. What is your internet speed?

 2. Can you commit to the required schedule long-term?

 3. Have you used AI image tools before?

 4. Do you understand this is paid per listing, not hourly?

 5. Confirm availability Tuesday–Sunday PH evenings.

title: Female Cold Caller to Match Existing Audio Materials - Real Estate
description:
About the Job

We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on 
 or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi, I’m calling about the property on Thomas Street. Is this the owner?” 



My name is (Your name). I help someone who buys houses in the area. 



Would you ever consider selling that property? 



Okay, thanks for letting me know. 



Can I ask a quick question — is the property currently occupied or vacant? 



What is prompting you to consider selling it? 



Would the property need any repairs or updates?  



That’s helpful. The buyer usually likes to speak directly with owners who may consider selling. 



What would be the best time for him to give you a call? 



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: E-Commerce Reporting & Finance Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
What we're looking for

We're looking for a hands-on e-commerce data and finance specialist to help keep a fast-growing 7-figure Shopify business sharp. This is not a strategic or advisory role — we need someone who works with data daily, builds solid dashboards, and genuinely understands the numbers.

What you bring:



- Deep, hands-on expertise with Shopify reports, dashboards, and the Shopify interface — this is non-negotiable

- 3+ years of intensive experience analyzing data within Shopify businesses

- Proven experience with VAT compliance and reporting for European markets

- Strong experience managing multi-currency transactions and converting them into a base currency for accurate financial reporting

- ~15 hours per week availability



What you'll do:



- Build and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports and dashboards

- Identify and communicate trends in revenue, margins, and key performance metrics

- Support growth decisions with clear, actionable data insights

- Handle multi-currency reconciliation and European VAT reporting



You're a great fit if you:



- Think in numbers but communicate in plain language

- Work independently and move fast

- Know your way around EU VAT rules and cross-currency financials

- Are comfortable fully owning the financial reporting of a scaling e-commerce brand

title: Procurement Manager
description:
Position Summary



The Procurement Manager is responsible for managing the organization’s purchasing strategy, supplier relationships, and procurement processes to ensure cost efficiency, quality, and timely delivery of goods and services. This role oversees sourcing, vendor negotiations, contract management, and procurement compliance to support operational and strategic objectives.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Procurement



Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with company objectives.



Identify cost-saving opportunities and improve procurement efficiency.



Conduct market analysis to identify reliable suppliers and pricing trends.



Vendor & Supplier Management



Source, evaluate, and onboard vendors and suppliers.



Negotiate pricing, contracts, and service agreements.



Maintain strong relationships with key suppliers to ensure reliability and quality.



Purchasing Operations



Oversee purchasing activities including requisitions, purchase orders, and deliveries.



Ensure timely procurement of materials, equipment, and services.



Monitor supplier performance and delivery schedules.



Cost Control & Budget Management



Monitor procurement budgets and spending.



Implement cost control measures and negotiate favorable pricing.



Track savings and procurement performance metrics.



Contract & Compliance Management



Review and manage supplier contracts and agreements.



Ensure procurement processes comply with company policies and regulatory requirements.



Maintain procurement documentation and audit records.



Inventory & Supply Chain Coordination



Collaborate with inventory, warehouse, and operations teams to ensure proper supply levels.



Monitor stock levels and forecast procurement needs.



Prevent shortages or excess inventory.



Team Leadership



Supervise procurement staff and purchasing specialists.



Provide training and guidance on procurement policies and systems.



Establish procurement KPIs and performance targets.



Qualifications

Education



Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Logistics, or related field



Experience



5–10 years experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain management



2–5 years in a supervisory or managerial role



Required Skills



Strategic sourcing and vendor negotiation



Contract management



Cost analysis and budgeting



Supply chain and inventory management



Procurement systems (ERP, SAP, Oracle, etc.)



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Leadership and team management



Excellent communication and negotiation skills



Preferred Certifications



Certified Professional in Supply Management (CPSM)



Certified Supply Chain Professional (CSCP)



Certified Purchasing Manager (CPM)



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Cost savings achieved through procurement initiatives



Supplier performance and delivery reliability



Purchase order processing time



Procurement budget adherence



Inventory availability and stock optimization

title: Music Management and Entertainment Growth Assistant
description:
Job Posting: 

Location: Remote (Philippines)







Focus: Exclusive Support for a Professional Recording Artist



About the Artist: You will be working directly for [Artist Name], a rising [Genre, e.g., Pop/Country/Soul] recording artist. With a signature sound described as [Vibe, e.g., "emotive, powerhouse vocals with a modern edge"], the brand is currently at an exciting tipping point. Having already achieved [Mention 1-2 wins, e.g., 50k monthly listeners / a sold-out local residency / a new album release], we are now focused on scaling the performance schedule and expanding the digital fanbase. We need a "growth engine" to help take this career to the next level.



About the Role: As the Music & Entertainment Growth Assistant, you aren't just handling admin—you are driving the business forward. Your mission is twofold: ensure the artist’s digital presence is flawless and fill the calendar with high-value performances. This role requires a mix of creative marketing, meticulous organization, and the "hustle" to make sales calls and close deals with talent buyers.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing, Relationship Mgmt, Bookings & Business Development : You will proactively research venues, festivals, and corporate events. You will be responsible for making outbound sales calls and sending personalized pitches to secure paid performances.



Social Media Management: You will plan and schedule content across social media platforms like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube staying on top of music trends and engaging with fans to build a tight-knit community.



 Marketing: You will manage the artist’s mailing list, designing and sending weekly/monthly newsletters to announce new music, merchandise drops, and tour dates.



Relationship Nurturing & CRM: You will maintain our database of industry contacts, ensuring we follow up with talent buyers and past clients to keep the artist "top of mind."



Admin & Logistics: You will update the official website, manage the master calendar, and ensure the Electronic Press Kit (EPK) is always updated for high-stakes opportunities.



Requirements:



Exceptional Verbal English: You must be confident, clear, and persuasive on the phone with US-based venues and organizers.



Sales Mindset: You enjoy the challenge of outreach and are motivated by hitting booking targets and earning bonuses.



Marketing Savvy: Proficient in Canva,
 platforms (like Mailchimp), and social media scheduling tools.



Proactive & Reliable: You don't wait to be told what to do; you look for opportunities to grow the brand. You must have a stable, high-speed internet connection.



How to Apply (Mandatory)

To be considered, we require a 1–2 minute video introduction. Applications without a video link will be automatically disqualified. Please include:



Experience: A quick summary of your background in sales or digital marketing.



The "Why": Why does the music industry excite you?



The Live Pitch: Spend 30 seconds pretending I am a festival organizer. Pitch me on why I should book Marionna for my event.



The Link: Upload your video to Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link with your resume.

title: Facebook Ads Media Buyer / Campaign Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized and experienced
 Ads Media Buyer to join our team. Your primary responsibility will be the day-to-day management and execution of our
 ad campaigns, ensuring new creatives are tested efficiently and data is tracked flawlessly.



We operate at a high scale, so strict adherence to our standard operating procedures (SOPs) and meticulous data tracking are non-negotiable.



Key Responsibilities

- Campaign Execution: Uploading and launching new ad creatives into our test campaigns exactly as outlined in our SOPs.

- Daily Reporting: Conducting end-of-day check-ins detailing total spend, ROAS, and explicitly noting which ads were turned off.

- Meticulous Tracking: Updating our master tracking sheets daily.

- Data Organization: Cataloging every single ad in our database, ensuring all required fields are filled out accurately (e.g., creative angle, link to our Notion board, and the live ad link).



Requirements

- High-Spend Experience: You must have a proven track record of managing at least $5,000 to $10,000+ in daily
 Ad spend.

- Fluent English: Impeccable English comprehension and speaking skills are strictly required for team communication and reporting.

- System-Oriented: You must be highly organized, comfortable working heavily in spreadsheets and Notion, and able to follow precise instructions without deviation.



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you must submit a brief Loom video with your application. In the video, please:

- Introduce yourself and explain your previous media buying experience.

- Provide screen-share proof of the ad accounts you have managed, specifically demonstrating experience with $5k-$10k+ daily spends.



(Note: Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.)

title: DM Appointment Setter
description:
We run a world-class online fitness coaching company helping busy Asian men lose stubborn belly fat, build lean muscle, and stay in shape without cutting out the cultural foods they love.



Our brand and client base is growing fast. As a result, we are rapidly expanding our team and looking for a high-performance DM setter who knows how to turn conversations into booked calls so we can help even more people!



If you thrive in a results-driven environment and want uncapped earning potential, keep reading.



Compensation:



- Full-time: 40–50 hours per week

- Pay: $650 USD per month

- Commission: 3-5% of cash collected from every client you book who enrolls

- Expected Earnings: $800–$1,200+ per month



**Top performers earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role. Your income scales with your output.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



- Initiating conversations with new followers, story viewers, and engaged prospects

- Reaching out to warm and targeted outbound leads daily

- Using our scripts + frameworks while making conversations feel natural and human

- Asking intelligent qualifying questions

- Moving qualified prospects into booked sales calls

- Following up consistently with warm leads

- Tracking conversations and outcomes inside our CRM

- Maintaining our brand voice and communication standards

- You will be expected to generate volume while maintaining quality.



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong written English (clear, natural, professional — no grammar mistakes)

- Quick response speed and ability to handle multiple conversations at once

- 1–3+ years of experience as a DM setter (fitness industry preferred)

- Proven history of booking qualified calls that actually show up

- Reliable laptop + fast internet

- Comfortable sending 80–100+ high-quality messages per day

- Willing to work flexible hours, including weekends when needed

- Highly coachable and able to take feedback fast

- Competitive, disciplined, and motivated by performance

- We move quickly. You must be comfortable keeping up.



Why This Is a Big Opportunity:



- Work directly with a rapidly scaling online fitness coaching company with a passion for client results and excellence across the board

- Clear SOPs, scripts, and leadership support

- Real growth path for top performers (raises + leadership opportunities)

- Paid onboarding and training

- Remote position

- Be part of a team with high standards and long-term vision

- We value excellence, accountability, and growth.



How To Apply:



Send a short message replying to this job post explaining why you want to apply



**within 24-72 hours, all eligible applicants will be invited to an interview.



Looking forward to speaking with you!

title: Product Development Assistant – Find Manufacturer for IoT Weather Device

title: Client Success Manager (CSM)
description:
We are Apartment locators who  helps renters secure apartments faster by matching them with the best options, booking tours, and guiding them through the application process. We move quickly, follow up consistently, and operate with tight systems so no lead falls through the cracks.



Hourly pay  + Bonus's 

Part-time

5 days/week

You must be available to respond to leads quickly during your shift.

Compensation

Competitive hourly 

Performance-based bonuses available after training (tours booked, apps submitted, leases confirmed)



Your Mission

Turn leads into leases by responding fast, following up consistently, booking tours, and keeping our CRM pipeline clean. This role is for someone who can execute daily.



Core Responsibilities (Daily)

1) Lead Follow-Up + Tour Booking (Top Priority)

Respond to new leads quickly and professionally

Follow up with warm leads until tours are booked or the lead is closed out

Collect key details: move date, budget, city, must-haves, unit preferences, income/approval needs

Book tours and confirm details with clients and properties when needed



2) CRM Pipeline Management (Daily hygiene)

Update stages correctly (New Lead ? Qualified ? Options Sent ? Tour Pending ? Tour Booked ? Applied ? Leased/Won)

Correctly label Ghosted vs Closed Lost

Tag leads properly, remove duplicates, and ensure notes are complete



3) Marketplace Lead Gen (Light but consistent)

Create 3
 Marketplace posts/day

Reply to messages at the start and end of your shift



4) Social Posting (Consistency)

Post at least 1 piece of content/day on Texas Apartment Finds IG or TikTok

Light/simple content is fine (leasing tips, quick slides, captions, reposts, basic reels)



5) Daily Reporting (Non-negotiable)

Update our Google Sheet “Daily Ops Command Center” at the end of every shift:

follow-ups sent

stage moves

tours requested/booked

apps started/submitted

SLA met (Y/N)

end-of-shift notes + blockers



Performance Standards (KPIs)

You will be measured on:

Speed-to-lead: New leads responded to within 10 minutes during shift (tracked Y/N)

Follow-ups: 15–25 follow-ups/day

Progression: leads moved forward daily (stage moves)

Tours: 1–2 tours booked/day or 5/week

Apps: at least 1+ app started/submitted weekly (goal increases as volume grows)

Clean, accurate CRM stages (no mislabeling)



Tools We Use

GoHighLevel (CRM + texting)

Google Sheets (daily scoreboard)

 Marketplace

Instagram + TikTok

Dropbox/Drive (light file access)

ASANA

You do not need to be a GoHighLevel expert, but you must be willing to learn quickly and follow SOPs.



Requirements

Strong written English (clear, professional, friendly)

Comfortable sending follow-ups daily (you cannot be shy about outreach)

Organized and detail-oriented (CRM accuracy matters)

Able to handle repetitive tasks with consistency

Fast learner + coachable

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Bonus (not required):

Apartment locating/leasing/real estate admin experience

Customer support or inside sales experience

Experience booking appointments/tours



Training + Onboarding

Paid training period

SOPs provided

You’ll start with follow-ups + tour booking first, then add posting/content tasks



How to Apply (Required)

To apply, include:

A short intro + your relevant experience

Your internet speed + device type

Your availability (hours + timezone)

The phrase “TAF CSM – speed matters” in your subject line/message

Answer this scenario (2–4 sentences):

A lead says: “I need something downtown Austin under $2,000, moving in 3 weeks.”

Write your response to qualify them and move toward booking tours.

We will only interview applicants who follow instructions.

title: Executive Assistant to the Physician-CEO
description:
I am a US-based physician with an active clinical practice and several business ventures in the healthcare space. My work spans patient care, online education, and health technology — and I need reliable, organized support to keep everything running smoothly.



I need a highly organized, intelligent, and proactive Executive Assistant who can serve as the operational backbone of my professional life — someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and gets things done without needing to be micromanaged.



This is not a typical EA role.

You will support a busy physician across both clinical and business operations — handling communications, documentation, research, and scheduling across multiple concurrent projects. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy bringing order to complex work — this role is for you.



Core Responsibilities

This is a full-time, long-term remote position. You will handle a wide range of administrative and operational tasks across both clinical and business activities. You must be comfortable managing multiple priorities simultaneously and working independently with minimal supervision.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage calendar, scheduling, and appointments across multiple time zones

Handle
 correspondence via Gmail — draft, send, and organize on behalf of the principal

Organize and maintain files in Google Drive (documents, reports, contracts, protocols)

Transcribe and format voice-dictated notes into polished Google Docs

Track tasks and action items across concurrent projects and follow through on deadlines

Coordinate with contractors, vendors, clinical staff, and external partners

Conduct research tasks — medical, regulatory, business, and administrative

Assist with formatting presentations, business documents, and one-pagers

Monitor and triage inboxes; flag priority items and respond to routine inquiries

Support light bookkeeping and expense tracking in Google Sheets

Assist with social media scheduling and basic online presence tasks



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written and spoken English (C1 or above)

Expert-level Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive, Calendar

Strong transcription and document formatting skills

Prior experience as a VA or EA supporting a business owner or executive

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Able to handle confidential medical and business information with discretion

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace



NICE TO HAVE

Background in healthcare administration or medical settings

Experience with research tasks (PubMed, regulatory, market)

Familiarity with Canva, slide design, or basic content tools

Experience with project tools such as Asana, Notion, or ClickUp



CONFIDENTIALITY NOTE

A signed Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is required before work begins. This role involves access to protected health information (PHI), confidential business materials, and sensitive legal documents. You must be comfortable handling all such information with strict discretion. Confidentiality obligations apply during and after employment.



Note: I am looking for the best of the best you must be competent and efficient.

title: Funnel builder (funnelish)
description:
Title: Funnelish Expert for Drop Shipping Business Needed



About Us:



We are a dynamic e-commerce business passionate about the drop shipping business model. In the rapidly evolving online shopping world, we aim to stay at the forefront of innovation and customer satisfaction. Our team is made up of driven, creative A-players who thrive in a collaborative and fast-paced environment. As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a skilled Funnel Builder to join our team and help us enhance our digital marketing efforts.



Job Responsibilities:

- Design, build, and optimize sales funnels using Funnelish to maximize conversion rates and generate leads.

- Conduct A/B testing for various funnel stages to identify the most effective strategies and implement improvements.

- Collaborate with the marketing and design teams to ensure cohesive branding and messaging across all funnel stages.

- Analyze funnel performance data to understand customer behavior and identify bottlenecks or opportunities for optimization.

- Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends and technologies in funnel building and e-commerce to recommend and implement new strategies.



Skills & Capabilities:

- Proven experience in building and optimizing product sales funnels, preferably in an e-commerce setting.

- Experience linking Funnelish to Shopify Checkout

- Strong understanding of customer psychology and buying behaviors.

- Proficiency in Funnelish and other relevant digital marketing tools and platforms.

- Excellent analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and metrics to make informed decisions.

- Creative thinker with attention to detail and a problem-solving attitude.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, able to work effectively with cross-functional teams.

- Experience with Slack and Click Up



Compensation and Benefits:

- 20 USD per funnel (with bonus structure)

– Prospect of a higher payout as we continue working together long-term

- Remote work

- A dynamic and supportive team environment where your contributions are valued and encouraged.

- Opportunities for professional growth and development.

- Access to the latest tools and technologies in digital marketing and e-commerce.



How to Apply:

If you’re passionate about creating high-converting sales funnels and have a track record of success in e-commerce, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a portfolio of sales funnels you’ve built or optimized. Let us know what makes you excited about this role and how you can contribute to our team’s success.

title: Part-Time Shopify E-Commerce Manager
description:
PART-TIME SHOPIFY E-COMMERCE MANAGER

Soft Wash Technologies | Remote | ~10 hrs/week |$3.53 - $6.67 /hour



You know what a great Shopify store looks like — and more importantly, you know what a broken one looks like.



We sell pressure washing and soft washing equipment to professional contractors across the US. Our store is the business. When it's sharp, clear, and easy to buy from, contractors trust us. When it's not, they leave.

We're looking for one person to own the site.





A TYPICAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE THIS:



You log in, check the store, and notice the homepage banner is still promoting last month's sale. You swap it. You see a product description that reads like a spec sheet — you rewrite it so a contractor actually understands why they need it. You check Microsoft Clarity and spot that mobile visitors are dropping off on a collection page. You dig in and fix it. You publish a blog post you've been working on that targets a keyword you found during research. You update two FAQ answers that were outdated. You resize and optimize a few product images that were loading too slow.

Then you hop over to our Amazon and eBay listings — we only cross-post a handful of products there, but you make sure the inventory counts match, the images look right, and the descriptions aren't stale. It's not a huge lift, but if something's off, you catch it.

That's the job. Nobody tells you to do most of this. You just see it and handle it.





YOU'LL USE:



Shopify (daily), Amazon Seller Central, eBay Seller Hub, Canva, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, Notion, and GoHighLevel (we'll train you on GHL).





YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF:



You've actually managed a Shopify store — not just "set one up once." You've touched Amazon or eBay seller accounts enough to keep listings clean and accurate. You write product copy that sounds like a human talking to another human, not a keyword-stuffed robot. You can do basic image editing without being asked. You understand on-page SEO well enough to do it, not just talk about it. And you don't need someone checking in on you every day to make sure the work got done.





TO APPLY:



Take a look at 
. Send us a short message that includes one specific thing you'd change on the site and why. Include a link to a Shopify store you've worked on, or screenshots.

That's it. No novel. No generic cover letter. Just show us you looked.

title: YouTube Video Editor & Motion Graphics Designer
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory based in Mayfair, London. We help candidates land offers at Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, White & Case, Freshfields, Kirkland & Ellis, and other elite law firms and investment banks across London, New York, and Hong Kong.



Our YouTube channel 
 is growing fast and we need a long-term video editor to own our post-production pipeline. This is not a one-off project. We currently publish 5 videos per month and are scaling to 10 per month. The right person will have consistent, growing income working with a brand they can be proud of.



RATES AND VOLUME:



- Starting rate: $80 USD per long-form video

- After 60 days (strong performers): $95 USD per long-form video

- Volume: 5 videos/month now, scaling to 10 videos/month within 90 days

- Short-form clips: Paid separately on top of the base rate

- Thumbnails: Paid separately on top of the base rate

- Commitment: Long-term ongoing role only



TOTAL EARNINGS POTENTIAL:



- Month 1-2 at 5 videos: $400/month base + short-form and thumbnail add-ons

- Month 3+ at 10 videos on upgraded rate: $950/month base + add-ons

- Total realistic monthly package at full volume: $1,100 - $1,300+ USD

- This places you at the top of the experienced tier for this role type in the Philippines market

- We are building a long-term relationship, not cycling through freelancers



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Edit long-form YouTube videos (10-30 minutes) from raw talking-head footage to final export

- Colour grade, audio mix, pacing, and graphics overlay on every video

- Design and animate motion graphics: lower thirds, chapter cards, framework animations, kinetic text sequences

- Cut 5 short-form clips (60-90 seconds) per long-form video for TikTok and Instagram Reels

- Create thumbnail designs for every video (3 variations per video)

- Build reusable motion graphics templates (.mogrt) so the brand stays consistent at scale

- Add stylised captions and subtitles — not auto-generated defaults

- Implement B-roll inserts, chapter markers, and proof-of-outcome visual sequences

- Deliver files within agreed turnaround windows and follow our YouTube Production Bible



REQUIRED SKILLS:



- Adobe Premiere Pro — primary NLE, non-negotiable

- Adobe After Effects — motion graphics and animations, non-negotiable

- Adobe Photoshop — thumbnail design and asset creation

- Motion graphics templates (.mogrt) — building reusable brand assets

- Short-form editing — vertical 9:16 cuts for TikTok and Reels with strong hook-first pacing

- Audio editing — noise removal, EQ, compression, music ducking, broadcast-quality output

- Colour grading — consistent premium look using LUTs or manual grade

- Stylised captions with brand typography

- Thumbnail design with a proven high-CTR approach



NICE TO HAVE:



- Adobe Illustrator

- DaVinci Resolve

- CapCut or Descript

- Notion for workflow tracking



THIS IS NOT THE RIGHT ROLE IF:



- You are looking for one-off projects

- You use generic templates with no brand customisation

- You cannot consistently meet deadlines

- You need heavy direction on every decision — we provide a full Production Bible and clear briefs, after that we need your judgment, not your questions



HOW TO APPLY:



 
 with the subject line: "YouTube Editor Application — [Your Name]"



Your application must include:



1. Links to 3 examples of your best work. At least one must include motion graphics. YouTube links preferred.

2. At least one example of short-form content (TikTok, Reels, or YouTube Shorts) that you edited from a longer source.

3. Answer this in 200 words or less: Watch any video on 
 YouTube channel. What would you change in the edit, what motion graphic would you add, and why would it improve retention?

4. Your software stack and current availability.

5. Confirmation you are available for consistent long-term work.



Applications without a showreel will not be considered.

Applications that skip question 3 will not be considered.

We review in batches. Templated applications will not receive a response.

title: *RARE & EXCITING OPPORTUNITY* Operations Lead — Elite UK Career Advisory (Remote)
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory based in Mayfair, London. We help ambitious candidates land offers at Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, White & Case, Freshfields, Kirkland & Ellis, and other elite law firms and investment banks across London, New York, and Hong Kong.



We have:

- 153+ documented client outcomes at the world's most competitive firms

- Six trademarked career frameworks used by thousands of candidates globally

- A 2,800+ member community on Skool

- A fast-growing YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram presence

- A founder who has delivered sessions for MBA student clubs at Harvard Business School, MIT Sloan, and Yale School of Management



We are hiring an Operations Lead to run the day-to-day operations of the business so our founder can focus entirely on content creation and premium client delivery.



This is not a task-following VA role. You will be the operational backbone of the business — managing content shipping, lead response, client onboarding, and team coordination. Everything operational flows through you.



This role has a clear path to COO as the business scales.



RATES AND PROGRESSION:



- Starting salary: $800 - $1,200 USD/month depending on experience

- 90-day review: Salary increase for strong performers

- 12-month target: COO title and compensation package as team grows to 6-8 people

- This is a full-time long-term role — we are not looking for someone between jobs



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Content Shipping (Priority #1)

- Receive edited videos from our video editor

- Quality check all content before posting

- Schedule and post content via GoHighLevel to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn

- Ensure weekly targets are hit: 1 YouTube + 5 TikToks + 5 Reels + 3 LinkedIn posts

- Chase the video editor if deliverables are late

- Nothing ships late. You own this.



Lead Response

- Respond to all inbound leads within 2 hours (DMs,
s, enquiries)

- Qualify leads and schedule calls with the founder

- Follow up with non-responders

- Update CRM pipeline in GoHighLevel at all times



Client Onboarding

- Send contracts and process payments via Pensight

- Set up client folders and welcome materials

- Schedule first sessions

- Collect testimonials after client wins



Calendar and Inbox Management

- Manage the founder's calendar

- Protect deep work and filming blocks

- Triage
 and draft responses

- Flag urgent items immediately



Community Management

- Moderate Skool community (2,800+ members)

- Welcome new members

- Answer basic questions

- Flag complex questions for founder



Team Coordination

- Coordinate with video editor and 2 interns

- Assign tasks, set deadlines, review work

- You are the hub — everyone reports through you operationally



DAILY RHYTHM:



- First thing: Check all inboxes. Respond to urgent items. Flag for founder.

- Morning: Respond to leads. Schedule calls. Update CRM.

- Midday: Content shipping. Coordinate with editor. Post via GoHighLevel.

- Afternoon: Community management. Client admin. Team coordination.

- End of day: Send daily update to founder. No exceptions.



WEEKLY TARGETS:



- Lead response time: Under 2 hours

- YouTube posted: 1 per week

- TikToks posted: 5 per week

- Instagram Reels posted: 5 per week

- LinkedIn posts: 3 per week

- Daily founder updates sent: 5 per week

- Zero inbox: Daily



REQUIRED SKILLS:



- 3+ years experience as VA, EA, Operations Manager, or Project Manager

- Experience with GoHighLevel OR a comparable CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Experience scheduling and posting content to social media platforms

- Excellent written English — you will communicate directly with UK-based premium clients

- Proactive communicator — you flag problems before they escalate, not after

- Detail-oriented — nothing falls through the cracks, ever

- Comfortable managing a small team (editor + interns)

- Available for at least 4 hours overlap with UK timezone (GMT/BST)



NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience in coaching, education, or professional services

- Experience with Skool community platform

- Experience with Pensight or similar booking and payment tools

- Basic video editing skills as backup

- Experience working in founder-led businesses



TECH STACK:



- GoHighLevel (CRM and content scheduling)

- Pensight (payments and booking)

- Skool (community)

- Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar, Gmail)

- TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn



WHO YOU ARE:



- You take ownership. You do not wait to be told what to do.

- You communicate proactively. If something is stuck, you say so immediately.

- You are reliable. When you say something will be done, it gets done.

- You are detail-oriented. You catch mistakes before they go out.

- You can manage others. You are comfortable assigning tasks and holding people accountable.

- You want to grow. This role becomes COO as the business scales.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:



In 30 Days:

- Content shipping at full rhythm without founder involvement

- All leads responded to within 2 hours

- Daily updates flowing every working day

- Founder has zero admin tasks



In 90 Days:

- Business running smoothly without founder in operations

- 10+ new testimonials captured

- Salary reviewed upward for strong performers



In 12 Months:

- £500K+ revenue year

- Team grown to 6-8 people reporting to you

- COO title and package



HOW TO APPLY:



 
 with the subject line: "Operations Lead Application — [Your Name]"



Your application must include:



1. A brief introduction — 2 to 3 sentences about who you are and why this role suits you specifically.

2. Your experience with CRM tools — name the specific platforms you have used.

3. Your experience with social media scheduling and posting — name the platforms and tools.

4. Your experience managing a team — even a small one counts.

5. Your available hours and timezone.

6. Your expected monthly salary in USD.

7. Answer this in 100 words or less: Look at 
 TikTok or YouTube channel. What is one operational or content improvement you would make in the first 30 days and why?



Bonus: Record a 60-second video introducing yourself and why you want this role. This is not required but candidates who do it go to the top of the review pile immediately.

title: SETTING CALLER - EARN $1,000-$1,500 PER WEEK (MALE VOICE ONLY)
description:
PLEASE READ THE "HOW TO APPLY" PART BEFORE SENDING A MESSAGE



THE OPPORTUNITY:

We're hiring full-time callers to contact existing clients about pre-funded trading accounts. You handle initial outreach via text and phone, then book them with our closer who finalizes the sale.

This is NOT cold calling. These are warm leads who already use our service and trust us.

Your job: Qualify interest, book the appointment. Our closers handle the pressure.



FINANCIAL COMPENSATION

Base salary $
per week + commission



YOUR DAILY WORKFLOW:

TEXTING (30% of your time):

Morning: Send outreach messages to existing clients about the pre-funded account offer Throughout day: Follow up with those who don't immediately reply After calls: Send booking confirmation texts and appointment reminders

You're using
 to contact warm leads (our existing bot users). These people know us and trust us. Response rates are high.

PHONING (70% of your time):

One call per interested prospect. Your goal: explain the offer briefly, qualify their interest, and book them for a call with our closer.

Average call length: 15 minutes. You are NOT closing the sale. You're setting the appointment. The closer handles all objections, pricing negotiations, and final sale.

Conversion rate: 40%+ of people you call end up buying.

This is extremely high because:

-They're already customers (warm audience)

-The offer is valuable

-It's an upsell (they already trust the main product)

-You follow a proven script



WHY THIS ROLE IS LOW PRESSURE:

- No cold calling (everyone knows us already)

- No closing (someone else handles that part)

- No rejection handling (closer deals with objections)

- Script provided (proven framework you follow)

- Warm leads (high response and conversion rates)

You're the bridge. You educate, qualify, and book. The closer does the heavy lifting.



WORK SCHEDULE:

Full-time: 40 hours per week Flexible within 9:00 AM to 11:00 PM CET (Central European Time) You choose your 8-hour window, but must have minimum 6 hours overlap with CET business hours

Example schedules that work:

3:00 PM - 11:00 PM Manila Time (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM CET)

4:00 PM - 12:00 AM Manila Time (10:00 AM - 6:00 PM CET)



NON-NEGOTIABLES (MUST HAVE ALL):

1. FLUENT O
 ENGLISH (Speaking + Writing) You'll be calling and texting international clients. Must be clearly understood on the phone. Fluency is required. We will test this with a voice/video sample.

2. FULL-TIME COMMITMENT This is a 40-hour/week role. No side jobs, no part-time. We need consistency and focus.

3. STABLE INTERNET CONNECTION No frequent disconnections. You'll be on calls and need reliability. Backup internet solution required (mobile data as backup).

4. QUIET, PROFESSIONAL WORKSPACE You need a dedicated space where you can make calls without background noise. No crying babies, traffic sounds, or interruptions during calls. Professional environment essential.

5. QUALITY PHONE + HEADSET Clear audio is critical. You need a reliable smartphone or computer with a microphone/headset that produces crystal-clear sound. We will test audio quality before hiring.

6. PROVEN PHONE EXPERIENCE We need someone who has done phone-based sales, customer service, or appointment setting before.



WHAT MAKES YOU STAND OUT:

Previous experience in high-ticket sales or financial services

Experience with WhatsApp Business,
, or CRM systems

Track record of 50%+ appointment show rates as a setter

Comfortable discussing trading, investing, or prop firms (we'll train you, but prior knowledge helps)

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Organized and detail-oriented (tracking follow-ups, updating CRM)



HOW TO APPLY:

title: Post-Production Editor
description:
Juming Delmas Studios (JDS)

Position Overview

The Post-Production Editor is responsible for transforming raw footage into compelling, high-quality content that reflects the storytelling and production standards of Juming Delmas Studios. This role focuses on editing podcast episodes, promotional videos, and digital content in a way that enhances the narrative, maintains audience engagement, and aligns with the brand vision of each client.

At JDS, we treat podcasts like television productions. Editors are expected to move beyond simple cuts and transitions and actively shape the story through thoughtful pacing, visuals, graphics, and sound design.



Key Responsibilities

Video Editing & Story Development

Edit full podcast episodes, interviews, and video content.

Cut short-form clips for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.).

Structure edits to enhance storytelling, pacing, and viewer engagement.

Select and integrate appropriate B-roll, graphics, and visual elements.

Audio & Visual Quality

Clean and balance audio to ensure clarity and professional sound quality.

Color correct and grade footage to maintain visual consistency.

Ensure all videos meet JDS production quality standards.

Motion Graphics & Visual Enhancements

Incorporate motion graphics, titles, and captions when appropriate.



Use overlays, callouts, and visual elements to reinforce key 
nts in the content.

Create dynamic intros and outros based on JDS templates.

Collaboration

Work closely with the Production Team and Creative Director to meet project goals.

Participate in review meetings and incorporate feedback into revisions.

Maintain clear communication about project timelines and deliverables.

Organization & Workflow

Maintain organized project files and folders.



Follow JDS editing templates and naming conventions.

Ensure projects are completed by the assigned deadlines.

Deliverables

The Post-Production Editor may be responsible for producing:

Full podcast episodes

Short-form social media clips

Promotional video content

Client marketing videos

Highlight reels

Branded intros and outros

Required Skills



Proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).

Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and audience engagement.

Basic motion graphics and text animation knowledge.

Experience with audio cleanup and sound balancing.

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.

Preferred Qualifications



Experience editing podcasts or interview-based content.

Familiarity with YouTube and social media content formats.

Understanding of digital marketing and audience engagement strategies.

Work Expectations

All editing work must meet the quality standards of Juming Delmas Studios.

Editors are expected to follow feedback and continuously improve production quality.

Work must be completed within established project timelines.

Clear communication with the production team is required.

About Juming Delmas Studios



Juming Delmas Studios is an award-winning production company that has won over 15 film awards and has been selected in 40+ festivals worldwide. JDS specializes in podcast production, video editing, and digital marketing services, helping creators and businesses produce high-quality content that connects with audiences.

Our mission is to run podcasts like television shows, delivering professional production and storytelling that elevates our clients’ brands.



If you'd like, I can also help you create a second document that will actually protect JDS from bad editors called:

“Post-Production Editor Performance Standards & Disciplinary Policy.”

It will outline things like:

audio cleanup requirements

B-roll expectations

revision limits

deadlines

quality standards

title: Operations Assistant (Lead Gen + Social Media + Admin)
description:
Hours: Full-Time (8 hours/day)



About Metaone Group:

We are a Toronto-based AI-First Lead Generation Engine. We replace slow, manual digital marketing with high-speed, automated AI systems to provide local businesses with a constant stream of leads. We operate a global production cycle and are looking for a highly versatile tea
mber to join our Philippines hub.



The Role:

We are looking for a hybrid AI Growth & Operations Assistant. This is not a standard virtual assistant role. We need a tech-savvy problem solver who can hunt for leads, mass-produce social media content using AI, and keep our day-to-day digital office highly organized. If you love using technology to work smarter and faster across multiple devices, this is the role for you.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Searching & Hunting: Find and extract high-intent local business leads from platforms like
, Instagram, and Xiaohongshu.



AI Content Generation: Act as an AI prompt engineer to generate high volumes of localized social media content. You will use tools like ChatGPT Plus, Midjourney, and Canva to create daily posts, graphics, and copy for our campaigns.



Cross-Device Execution: Seamlessly switch between desktop platforms (for heavy data/admin work) and mobile phone apps (to execute manual social media engagement or bypass desktop restrictions on apps like IG/Xiaohongshu).



Day-to-Day Administration: Serve as the organizational backbone of your projects. You will manage our Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar, Sheets), organize raw lead files, and ensure the daily handoffs between tea
mbers run smoothly.



Requirements:



Computer & Mobile App Proficiency: You must be highly tech-savvy and extremely comfortable navigating, troubleshooting, and operating both desktop software (web browsers, Google Workspace, web apps) and mobile phone applications (social media apps, mobile workflows).



AI-First Mindset: You must be highly proficient with modern AI tools. If a task can be done by AI, we expect you to automate it.



Organization Skills: Exceptional attention to detail. You know how to build clean folder structures and keep digital workspaces flawless.



Reliability: A strong internet connection and the ability to join our daily 8:00 AM PHT voice syncs via our virtual office space.

description:

About Metaone Group:

We are a Toronto-based AI-First Lead Generation Engine. We replace slow, manual digital marketing with high-speed, automated AI systems to provide local businesses with a constant stream of leads. We operate a global production cycle and are looking for a highly versatile, tech-obsessed tea
mber to join our Philippines hub.



The Role:

We are looking for an AI Workflow & Lead Generation Specialist. We need a tech-savvy tinkerer—someone who loves testing new AI tools, figuring out faster ways to do things, and building smart workflows. Your daily mission will be to use technology to hunt for leads, generate localized content, and execute our social media posting strategy across multiple platforms. If you love finding "hacks" and automated workarounds, this is the role for you.



Key Responsibilities:



AI Workflow Building & R&D: Continuously research, test, and implement new AI tools or extensions to make our operations faster. If there is a new AI way to automate a daily task, we want you to find it and build the workflow.



Lead Hunting (Tech-Driven): Find and extract high-intent local business leads using smart scraping tools, AI-assisted searches, and data extraction methods.



Content Generation & Posting: Act as an AI prompt engineer to mass-produce social media content (using tools like ChatGPT Plus, Midjourney, Canva AI), and take ownership of actually scheduling and posting that content to platforms like
, Instagram, and Xiaohongshu.



Cross-Device Execution: Seamlessly switch between desktop platforms (for workflow building and heavy data extraction) and mobile phone apps (for posting content, engaging natively, and bypassing desktop restrictions on platforms like IG/Xiaohongshu).



Requirements:



Tech-Savvy & Curious: You must have a natural ability to learn new software quickly. You should already be familiar with basic automation concepts (like Zapier, Make, or browser extensions).



Computer & Mobile App Proficiency: You must be extremely comfortable navigating, troubleshooting, and operating both desktop software and mobile phone applications to get the job done.



AI-First Mindset: You rely on AI first. If a task requires manual copy-pasting for hours, you stop and figure out how to automate it instead.



Reliability: A strong internet connection and the ability to join our daily 8:00 AM PHT voice syncs via our virtual office space (Gather.town/Google Meet).

title: Remote Golf Video Editor
description:
About

We are a growing media brand dedicated to golf. Our mission is to entertain and engage golf fans by curating timeless, high-quality short-form content that celebrates the sport. We focus on evergreen golf clips that can be enjoyed by fans at any time, not just recent highlights or news.



Position: Remote Golf Video Editor

We are looking for a detail-oriented and golf-passionate Video Editor to help us build our library of short-form video content. The primary task will be sourcing timeless golf clips and editing them into engaging videos optimized for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
.



Key Responsibilities:

- Source evergreen golf content with long-term appeal.

- Edit raw clips into engaging, high-quality short-form videos.

- Add captions, titles, and creative elements to enhance engagement.

- Stay aware of what types of golf content typically go viral and adapt editing style accordingly.

- Deliver videos consistently and on time for internal review.



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong passion for golf: you follow the sport, understand it deeply, and know what excites fans.

- Proven experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar).

- Familiarity with short-form content trends, formats, and storytelling techniques.

- Creativity, attention to detail, and a strong sense of timing.

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

- Excellent English communication skills.



Compensation & Hours

- Base rate: $6 USD/hour

- Starting workload: 16 hours per month

- Additional hours may be available based on performance and output.

- Performance bonuses may also be awarded - details to be discussed individually at a later stage.



Application Requirement

To help us assess your skills and capabilities, please include:

- Examples of your past video editing work (portfolio, reels, or previous projects).

- A short explanation of your relation to golf (why you follow the sport, your experience with it, etc.).



If you are passionate about golf and skilled at editing engaging short-form videos, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Marketing Strategist/Growth Hacker
description:
We’re a growing entertainment management and marketing company based in the US ( NYC ), focused on scaling emerging talents in music, podcasts, and comedy. We have strong connections to MTV, Revolt, labels, Apple Music, and Spotify playlists, and we’re starting with one flagship artist (Jon) to prove our model before expanding.

We’re looking for a talented Marketing Strategist/Growth Hacker to help build audience and engagement for our creators. This is a remote, flexible role (10-20 hours/week to start, potential to grow). You’ll work closely with our founder to create data-driven strategies that turn raw talent into pitch-ready brands for deals and partnerships.

Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and execute growth plans for social platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Spotify) to increase followers and engagement (e.g., aim for 20% monthly growth).

• Run targeted ads (Meta, TikTok, Google) on a budget, optimizing for ROI.

• Analyze metrics using tools like Google Analytics, Chartmetric, or Instagram Insights; provide weekly reports and recommendations.

• Optimize content for virality (e.g., trends, SEO, A/B testing) in US entertainment niches (music tracks, podcast clips, comedy sketches).

• Collaborate on playlist pitching and cross-promotions using our industry connections.

Requirements:

• 3+ years in digital marketing or growth hacking, with proven results (e.g., case studies showing audience growth for creators or brands).

• Experience with US pop culture and trends in music, podcasts, or comedy (must provide examples).

• Proficient in tools: Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, Hootsuite/Buffer, Chartmetric (bonus).

• Strong English communication skills (written and spoken) for US-facing work.

• Self-starter who can work independently in a startup environment (time zone overlap with US EST preferred).

• Bonus: Certifications like Google Analytics or HubSpot; experience with entertainment creators.

What We Offer:

• Competitive pay: $8-15/hour (based on experience; paid via PayPal/Wise).

• Opportunity to grow with us as we expand to more talents.

• Flexible hours and remote work.

• Access to exciting industry connections for your portfolio.

To apply, reply with:

• Your resume/portfolio.

• 2-3 examples of past growth campaigns (e.g., “Grew a podcast’s IG from 5K to 15K in 3 months via Reels and ads”).

• A quick 1-paragraph idea for growing a musician’s TikTok audience using trends.

Only serious applicants—include “Wave Entertainment” in your subject line. We’re excited to build something big—let’s chat!

title: Remote U.S. Registered Nurse (USRN)
description:
Remote U.S. Registered Nurse (USRN)

Clinical Documentation, Compliance, Onboarding & Case Management RN

Remote – Philippines | Supporting U.S. Healthcare Operations



Position Overview

A U.S.-based healthcare organization is seeking a Philippines-based Registered Nurse who holds an active U.S. RN license to support clinical operations remotely.



Applicants must hold either:

1. an active Nurse Licensure Compact (NLC) RN license, or

2. an active State of Georgia RN license



This role supports patient onboarding, case management coordination, clinical documentation review, and audit-ready chart management for a U.S. healthcare organization.



The nurse will work closely with the clinical and operations teams to ensure that all patient documentation, care plans, and onboarding records remain complete, compliant, and audit-ready at all times.



This position involves remote clinical coordination and documentation support only. No hands-on nursing care is performed.



Core Responsibilities

Patient Onboarding

1. Review new patient intake documentation for completeness and regulatory compliance

2. Ensure all consents, intake forms, service plans, and required documentation are completed prior to service initiation

3. Identify documentation gaps and coordinate corrections with internal staff



Clinical Documentation & Compliance

1. Maintain audit-ready patient charts

2. Review clinical documentation for accuracy, completeness, and regulatory compliance

3. Ensure records meet U.S. healthcare documentation standards and HIPAA requirements

4. Track missing documentation and ensure timely correction



Case Management Support

1. Assist with care coordination and ongoing case management documentation

2. Monitor care plans and ensure documentation reflects current services

3. Track physician orders, follow-ups, and documentation updates

4. Support communication between clinical staff, caregivers, and patients



Chart Audits & Quality Control

1. Perform routine chart audits and documentation reviews

2. Prepare records for internal quality reviews and regulatory readiness

3. Maintain documentation standards that support survey and compliance readiness



Operational Clinical Support

1. Support EMR documentation workflows

2. Monitor chart completion and documentation timeliness

3. Assist with internal documentation quality monitoring



Required Qualifications

Active U.S. Registered Nurse License (USRN)

     -Nurse Licensure Compact (NLC) OR

     -Active Georgia RN License

Currently residing in the Philippines

Experience supporting U.S. healthcare providers or organizations

Strong knowledge of U.S. clinical documentation standards

Familiarity with HIPAA compliance and patient privacy requirements

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

High attention to detail and strong documentation discipline



Preferred Experience

Experience in any of the following areas is strongly preferred:

1. Home care or home health operations

2. Case management or care coordination

3. Clinical documentation review or chart audits

4. Telehealth support

5. EMR systems such as:

     - AxisCare

     - Epic

     - Athena

     - eClinicalWorks

     - similar platforms



Technical Requirements

Applicants must have:

     - Reliable high-speed internet

     - Quiet professional workspace

     - Computer capable of running EMR platforms

     - Professional headset for phone and video communication



Work Schedule

This role supports U.S. healthcare operations.



Applicants must be able to work:



U.S. daytime business hours

(or overlapping hours with U.S. operations)



Compensation

$1,000 – $1,300 USD per month



Compensation is based on:

     - USRN license status

     - experience supporting U.S. healthcare providers

     - documentation and compliance experience



Licensing Verification

All applicants must hold an active U.S. RN license.

The company will perform full license verification through the issuing state board of nursing prior to employment.

Applicants who misrepresent license status will be immediately disqualified.

title: Virtual Controller Assistant / Financial Operations Virtual Assistant
description:

Reports to: Founder / Controller = whatsapp
?

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to operate as a Financial Operations Coordinator across multiple companies. This role will function as a remote controller assistant responsible for managing accounts payable, accounts receivable, financial tracking, bill management, and coordinating with accountants and tax professionals.



This position requires someone with strong financial discipline who can maintain accurate records, ensure bills are paid on time, track incoming payments, and provide clear financial reporting.



The ideal candidate is proactive, extremely organized, and comfortable managing financial workflows across multiple business entities.



?



Core Responsibilities

Financial Organization

Tax Coordination

Cash Flow Management

?



Required Skills

 • financial reporting

 • Experience using:

 • QuickBooks

 • Xero

 • Google Sheets

 • Excel

 • High attention to detail

 • Strong organizational skills

 • Excellent written communication

 • Ability to manage multiple companies simultaneously



?



Preferred Qualifications

?



Tools Used

 • Payment platforms



?



Success Metrics



Success in this role means:

 • Bills paid on time

 • Accurate cash flow tracking

 • Organized tax documentation

 • Clear weekly financial reporting

title: Hiring Virtual Assistants
description:
We are an e-commerce company based in California, USA. We've been in business for over ten years and have extensive experience in eCommerce. We're currently looking for a few high-energy, good communicators, punctual, able to follow instructions, analytical, and hard workers.

Thank you for your interest, and see you on the other side.

title: WP Funnel Designer & Builder (CRO Focused) – Zentra Digital
description:
WooCommerce Funnel Designer & Builder (CRO Focused) – Zentra Digital



Zentra Digital is looking for an A player WooCommerce Funnel Designer & Builder to join our team.



We build high converting ecommerce funnels in the health niche, and we are looking for someone who understands conversion psychology, clean design, and performance driven funnels.



This is not a basic web design role. We want someone who understands how to build funnels that actually convert, not just how to make pages look good.



Responsibilities



- Design and build high converting WooCommerce funnels

- Create landing pages, product pages, upsells, downsells, and checkout flows

- Build funnels using Elementor together with CartFlows or FunnelKit

- Design layouts using Figma, Canva, or similar tools

- Implement advertorial pages and presell flows

- Improve conversion rate optimization across funnels

- Work with the team to test and improve funnel performance



You will primarily work with Elementor together with CartFlows or FunnelKit to build scalable funnels. Experience with Figma, Canva, or similar design tools is important, since you should be comfortable designing layouts before building them.



Part of your role will also include implementing advertorial pages and presell flows that support paid traffic campaigns. Attention to detail is extremely important in this role. As a small note to confirm applicants actually read the description carefully, please include the words Orange Whale somewhere in your application message.



Because our funnels operate in competitive ecommerce environments, understanding conversion rate optimization and direct response marketing principles is essential.



Requirements



- Strong experience with WooCommerce

- Strong experience with Elementor

- Experience with CartFlows or FunnelKit

- Design skills using Figma, Canva, or similar tools

- Understanding of CRO and ecommerce funnel strategy

- Experience with advertorial funnels or presell pages is a strong advantage

- Ability to create clean, modern, high converting layouts

- Strong attention to detail



Who we are looking for



We are looking for A players only.



- Proactive and takes ownership of their work

- Thinks about performance and conversions, not just design

- Comfortable working in fast moving ecommerce environments

- Wants to grow with a serious team



If you simply execute tasks without thinking about conversion and performance, this role is likely not the right fit.



What we offer



- Long term opportunity with Zentra Digital

- Opportunity to grow with our team and boost your career

- Performance based bonuses and incentives

- Work on high scale ecommerce funnels



How to apply



Please send:



- Examples of funnels or landing pages you built

- A short introduction about your experience

- The tools and builders you are comfortable with



Only applications with relevant examples of previous work will be considered.

This role is primarily project management and operations, but the candidate must already be familiar with HubSpot and comfortable performing basic CRM tasks when needed.

Convert meeting recordings and notes into actionable tasks



Track deadlines and follow up on deliverables



Maintain documentation and project SOPs



Prepare weekly project updates

Create and manage lists



Update properties and contact/company records

Experience working inside HubSpot CRM



Familiarity with contacts, companies, deals, and pipelines



Experience creating lists or reports



Understanding of basic workflows or automation



Experience supporting CRM or marketing operations



Additional requirements:



2+ years project coordination or operations experience



Experience with task management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)



Strong communication and documentation skills.



Clearly speaks English. 



Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

---

Preferred Experience



Experience working for a HubSpot agency or consulting firm



Familiarity with RevOps or CRM implementation projects



Experience QA testing CRM builds or automations

---

Tools



HubSpot

ClickUp

Google Workspace

Slack

Loom

---

Hours



5–10 hours per week to start, with potential to increase over time.

3. Your project management experience

List three tasks you have personally completed inside HubSpot.

title: Shopify Technical SEO / Google Merchant Center Developer

title: YouTube Video Editor (Product Review Channel)
description:
Summary

We are seeking a creative and skilled video editor to join our team and help elevate our YouTube product review channel. Our videos range from 10 to 30 minutes in length, and while we currently produce roughly 2 videos per month due to limited manpower, we plan to increase our output in the near future.



Responsibilities

-Footage Editing: Organize, trim, and arrange raw footage to create a compelling, well-paced narrative.

-Enhancing Visual Appeal: Incorporate transitions, effects, graphics, and text overlays to elevate the video’s quality and viewer engagement.

-Audio Management: Sync voiceovers and sound effects to ensure clear and balanced audio.

-Color Correction & Grading: Enhance the visual quality through effective color correction and grading if needed.

-Collaboration & Revisions: Work closely with our team to integrate feedback and ensure consistency with our brand guidelines.

-Timely Delivery: Adhere to deadlines and manage project timelines efficiently.



Qualifications

-Proven experience as a YouTube video editor, ideally with a portfolio that includes product review content.

-Proficient in video editing software such as Final Cut Pro (preferred), Adobe Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

-Excellent sense of timing, narrative structure, and visual storytelling.

-Ability to work under deadlines, manage projects independently, and communicate effectively with the team.



Long-Term Opportunity: We’re looking for a partner who can grow with our channel as our production needs increase.



If you’re passionate about video editing and have experience creating engaging, high-quality content, we’d love to see your work. Please include samples of your previous projects, particularly any product review videos, along with your estimated turnaround time for a 10–15 minute video.

title: AI-POWERED MARKETING & SEO SPECIALIST
description:
Core Responsibilities

1. AI-Powered SEO & Content Engine

• Use ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude AI (including advanced features and workflows) to perform keyword research, create SEO content briefs, generate optimized blog posts, and build topic clusters with internal linking strategies

• Develop scalable AI-driven content systems that produce consistent, high-quality output

2. Lead Generation & Conversion Systems

• Build AI-assisted landing pages and funnels

• Write high-converting
 sequences and newsletters

• Research target audiences and pain points; create messaging frameworks focused on conversion

• Integrate automation tools and CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Mailchimp, GoHighLevel)

3. Creative & Ad Development (AI-Enhanced)

• Design creatives using Canva and AI tools

• Create short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut or similar

• Write hooks, scripts, captions, and ad copy

• Analyze ad performance and optimize accordingly

4. Research & Competitive Intelligence

• Scrape and analyze competitor content and ads

• Reverse-engineer high-performing campaigns

• Track engagement and performance data; provide optimization recommendations

5. Website & Automation

• Build and edit websites (WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, etc.)

• Connect landing pages to
 systems and CRMs

• Automate repetitive marketing tasks using AI and tools like Zapier or Make



Required Skills & Experience

Must-Have

• Advanced use of ChatGPT (prompt engineering & workflow design)

• Working knowledge of Gemini and Claude AI (must understand full feature capabilities)

• SEO knowledge: on-page optimization, keyword research, content structuring

• Canva proficiency for marketing creatives

• Video editing experience (CapCut, Canva Video, or similar)

• Social media marketing knowledge across major platforms

• Website building experience (WordPress, Shopify, or Webflow)

• Strong English communication (written and verbal)

• Analytical mindset – you make decisions based on data, not guesses

Nice-to-Have (Bonus Points)

• Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or ActiveCampaign

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush/Ahrefs

• Experience with Zapier, Make, or n8n for automation

• Copywriting training or background (e.g., AWAI, direct response)

• Prior experience working with international clients remotely



What We Offer

We value Filipino talent and have structured this role with benefits that matter to you:

• Competitive Salary: PHP 30,000–60,000/month depending on skills and test performance

• 13th Month Pay: Guaranteed, as required by Philippine labor standards

• Performance Bonuses: Monthly or quarterly bonuses tied to KPIs

• HMO / Health Allowance: Health coverage support for you (and family, depending on tenure)

• Paid Time Off: Vacation leaves, sick leaves, and Philippine holidays observed

• 100% Work From Home: No commuting. Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

• Equipment Allowance: Assistance for internet or hardware upgrades (discussed during onboarding)

• Skill Development: Access to AI tools, courses, and resources to grow your career

• Long-Term Growth: This is not a gig. We want someone who grows with the company.

• Respectful Culture: Clear expectations, no micromanagement, results-focused environment



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Your performance will be measured on:

• Organic traffic growth (month-over-month)

• Number of qualified leads generated

• Conversion rate improvements across funnels and landing pages

• Engagement metrics (social media,
 open/click rates)

• Automation efficiency – time saved through AI workflows



Hiring Process (Paid Test Required)

Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test project to demonstrate real ability. This is not free labor – your time is compensated.

Test Assignment

You will be given a sample niche and asked to:

1. Create a 30-day AI-powered content + lead generation strategy

2. Show the exact prompts used inside ChatGPT, Gemini, and/or Claude

3. Build one SEO-optimized blog outline

4. Create one landing page wireframe (mockup acceptable)

5. Provide one short-form video script and Canva creative concept

We Are Evaluating

• Strategic thinking – Do you understand the big picture?

• AI workflow efficiency – Can you use AI tools as a multiplier, not a crutch?

• Conversion-focused messaging – Does your work drive action?

• Quality of execution – Is the output polished and professional?

• Clarity of thinking – Can you explain your reasoning?

Compensation: The test will be paid. Details will be provided to shortlisted candidates. Only candidates willing to complete the test will be considered for long-term hire.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. AI Experience: A paragraph explaining your hands-on experience with ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude AI. Be specific – what have you built or accomplished with these tools?

2. Portfolio: Links to SEO content, marketing campaigns, or related work samples.

3. Creative Samples: Canva designs, video edits, or ad creatives you have produced.

4. Strategy Brief: A short explanation (3–5 sentences) of how you would use AI to build a lead generation engine.

5. Expected Salary: Your expected monthly rate in PHP.

6. Paid Test Confirmation: Confirm that you are willing to complete a paid test assignment.
