title: Admin Support and Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent

Website: 
  Closing Midnight 13th March  2026



We’re Hiring: 

Customer Service / Sales Specialist (Full-Time, Remote – Independent Contractor)

Company:    AIMS Industrial – Sydney, Australia

Location:      Remote (Must reside within a 2-hour drive of Manila CBD)

Schedule:     Monday to Friday, Australian business hours Timeframe.



Important:

This is a strictly full-time role. Applicants who cannot commit to full-time hours or who live outside the 2-hour radius from Manila CBD will not be considered.



About Us

AIMS Industrial is a leading Australian supplier of industrial, maintenance, and safety products. We’re known for our quality range, reliable delivery, and professional customer service. As we continue to grow internationally, we’re expanding our dedicated support team in the Philippines to help maintain our high service standards.



About the Role

You’ll join our remote Manila-based team working closely with our Sydney head office. The role suits a reliable professional who thrives on customer interaction, values precision, and can manage multiple tasks with strong follow-up and accountability. You’ll also have autonomy to streamline processes and contribute to continuous improvement.



Key Responsibilities

• Handle customer communications via phone,
 and chat (Tawk).

• Dealing with Shopify orders and Internal Jim System Process

• Manage order inquiries, updates, cancellations, returns, and issue resolution.

• Build ongoing customer relationships through consistent, high-quality service.

• Prepare accurate and timely quotations while maintaining profitability.

• Collaborate with suppliers on pricing, delivery, and order fulfillment.

• Follow up on delayed orders, provide alternatives, and focus on customer retention.

• Coordinate with internal departments (Product Data, Accounts, Marketing) to resolve issues and improve service.

• Sourcing alternative Solutions.

• Actively participate in supplier training and internal sales improvement programs.



What You’ll Need

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills.

• Strong customer service focus and consistent follow-up habits.

• Ability to complete tasks efficiently and meet deadlines.

• Enthusiasm for learning about industrial products (engineering or trade background is a plus).

• High attention to detail, strong organization, and multitasking ability.

• A team-oriented mindset with a proactive problem-solving attitude.



Technical Requirements

• Internet Speed: 10Mbps Download Min Actual (Rec. Min. 25mb down and 5mb up) 

• Multicore Processor e.g. Intel i5 or higher; AMD Ryzen 

• Memory: 8GB 

• Hard Drive: 128GB 

• Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OS Sequoia



Why Join Us

Our Manila team plays an essential role in our operations. You’ll receive structured training, ongoing support, and the opportunity to develop within an internationally growing company. This is not a call-centre environment — it’s a professional, service-driven team that values long-term relationships and continuous improvement.



Pay: Weekly, via AIMS Industrial.

title: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor
description:
Scope of Work: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor



1. Project Overview

Bomani Resort, located in Kikambala, Kilifi County, Kenya, is a unique boutique resort and 12-acre working farm offering a blend of Culture, Comfort, and Connection. The resort provides diverse accommodations, including stone cottages and glamping tents, and serves as a gateway to authentic Kenyan traditions, village life, and nearby beaches.



The objective of this engagement is to hire a Social Media Content Creator and Advisor to elevate the resort's digital presence, increase brand awareness, and drive bookings through strategic storytelling and high-quality content curation. Applicants are encouraged to review the resort's website at 
 for a comprehensive understanding of our brand and offerings.



2. Roles and Responsibilities

The selected professional will act as both a creative executor and a strategic advisor. The primary focus will be on transforming raw assets into compelling narratives that resonate with local and international audiences.



Category Description of Responsibilities

Content Creation Edit and curate unedited video and photography provided by the resort. Create engaging Reels, TikToks, and static posts that highlight the "farm-to-resort" lifestyle.

Strategic Advisory Develop a monthly content calendar aligned with seasonal trends and resort promotions. Advise on platform-specific strategies (Instagram,
, TikTok).

Community Management Monitor and respond to comments, messages, and inquiries. Engage with relevant travel influencers and local community accounts to expand reach.

Brand Consistency Ensure all digital communication reflects the resort’s core values: Culture, Comfort, and Connection. Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic and tone of voice.



3. Key Deliverables

The Consultant is expected to deliver the following items on a recurring and project-basis:



• Monthly Content Calendar: A detailed schedule of posts, stories, and reels across all active platforms, submitted for approval 7 days before the start of each month.

• Edited Visual Assets: A minimum of 3 high-quality Reels/Videos and 5 static/carousel posts per week, utilizing the provided raw footage and photography.

• Platform Optimization: Complete audit and optimization of Instagram and
 profiles, including bio updates, highlight covers, and SEO-friendly descriptions.

• Monthly Performance Report: A concise summary of key metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth) and actionable insights for the following month.



4. Content Themes and Pillars

To ensure a diverse and engaging feed, the content should revolve around the following pillars:



The Farm-to-Resort Experience: Showcasing the 12-acre working farm, fruit trees, and the unique tranquility of staying on a scenic agricultural property.



Authentic Kenyan Culture: Highlighting village walks, local food tasting, and excursions to historical sites that offer guests a deep connection to the region.



Diverse Accommodations: Creating specific features for the Langi Langi cottage, glamping tents, and studios to show the range of "comfort meets nature."



Guest Stories & Testimonials: Utilizing existing and new reviews to build trust and social proof among potential visitors.



5. Project Timeline and Logistics

• Contract Duration: Initial 3-month pilot period with the option for long-term renewal based on performance.

• Asset Handoff: The resort will provide raw, unedited video and photography via a shared Google Drive or Dropbox folder on a weekly/bi-weekly basis.

• Communication: Weekly 30-minute check-in calls to discuss upcoming events, promotions, and content performance.



6. Qualifications and Requirements

The ideal candidate should possess:

1 Proven experience in travel and hospitality social media management.

2 Advanced skills in mobile video editing (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, etc.) and graphic design (Canva, Photoshop).

3 A deep understanding of the Kenyan tourism landscape and current social media trends.

4 Excellent written English and the ability to craft evocative captions.

5 Submission of a short (approx. 30-second) sample reel demonstrating their creative approach to promoting a boutique resort, utilizing provided or self-sourced visuals.



7. Proposed Compensation

Compensation will be structured at $5 per hour, for an estimated 10 hours per week. Candidates are invited to submit their proposals based on the deliverables outlined in Section 3.



Prepared by: Bomani Resort Management     Date: March 6, 2026

title: Real Estate Facebook & Google Ads Specialist
description:
About the Companies



Legend Sports and Razzaque Paradise Properties are growth-driven companies operating in competitive real estate markets. Our focus is on lead generation and acquisition, not vanity metrics. Our goal is simple: to generate consistent, high-quality real estate leads that convert into real deals.



We are looking for a high-level Paid Ads Specialist with strong, hands-on experience in
 Ads and Google Ads for real estate to take full ownership of our paid acquisition funnel.



The Role



We are hiring an experienced Real Estate
 & Google Ads Specialist with at least 5 years of proven experience running paid acquisition campaigns in the real estate industry.



This role is for someone who understands real estate buyer and seller psychology, knows how to build high-converting marketing funnels, and can consistently optimize campaigns for Cost Per Lead (CPL), Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), and overall deal quality.



This is not an entry-level position. We are looking for a strategic operator who can plan, execute, and scale campaigns—not just someone who launches ads.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and scale
 Ads and Google Ads campaigns for real estate acquisition



Build and optimize full-funnel marketing campaigns (cold traffic ? retargeting ? conversion)



Generate qualified buyer and seller leads, not low-quality traffic



Continuously optimize campaigns for CPL, CPA, ROAS, and lead quality



Create and test high-converting ad creatives, copy, and audience targeting



Set up and manage tracking systems (Meta Pixel, Google Tags, conversions, and events)



Analyze campaign performance and make data-driven optimization decisions



Identify and resolve funnel bottlenecks quickly



Collaborate with internal teams to improve lead follow-up and conversion rates



What We’re Looking For



Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience running
 Ads and Google Ads for real estate



Proven track record in real estate lead generation and customer acquisition



Strong understanding of buyer and seller funnels and local market targeting



Experience managing high-budget ad accounts and scaling successful campaigns



Ability to manage advertising budgets responsibly and profitably



Highly analytical, results-driven, and detail-oriented



A self-starter who takes ownership and accountability for results



What Success Looks Like



A consistent flow of high-quality real estate leads



Stable and scalable acquisition systems



Continuous improvement in CPL and CPA



Clear reporting and transparency on campaign performance



Direct contribution to closed deals and revenue growth



Why Work With Us



Work with serious brands that have real budgets and clear acquisition goals



Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Full ownership of the paid advertising channel



A results-focused environment with no micromanagement



If you are a real estate paid ads expert who knows how to drive real acquisition—not just clicks—we want to hear from you.



Please send your CV and portfolio to:

title: Digital Ads Manager (Automotive Dealerships)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | USA-Based Creative Marketing Agency

Salary: $1,500–$2,000 USD/month



Most ad managers simply place campaigns. In this role, you’ll place high-quality creative — cinematic video, professional photography, and polished design — in front of the right audience for automotive dealerships across the United States.



If you enjoy the craft of paid media and want to work with creative assets that truly deserve a strong media strategy, this role may be the right fit for you.



About Us



We are a full-service creative marketing agency based in the United States. Our team produces premium creative content, including cinematic video, professional photography, and high-end graphic design for clients across multiple industries such as automotive, home services, finance, legal, construction, and non-profit organizations.



Our automotive clients include new car franchise dealerships, and they invest heavily in high-quality creative. This position exists to ensure that this creative content reaches the right audience at the right time through well-executed paid media campaigns.



The Role



We are looking for a Digital Ads Manager to work full-time with our team. You will report directly to our Paid Media Manager and play a key role in executing paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



This is a hands-on execution role. You will be actively working inside advertising platforms daily — building campaigns, optimizing performance, analyzing results, and managing creative assets across Meta, Google, and TikTok for multiple clients.



Automotive dealership experience is required. You must have direct experience running paid advertising for new car franchise dealerships, including tools and campaign types such as:



Google Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs / Google Vehicle Ads)



TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs)



Google Performance Max campaigns



Dealer tools such as vAuto, VinSolutions, DealerSocket, or similar platforms



We also value candidates who use AI and automation to improve efficiency — whether through workflow automation, reporting automation, scripts, or AI-assisted analysis. We are not looking for someone who simply pastes prompts into AI tools; we want someone who deeply understands the platforms and uses technology to enhance that expertise.



Work Schedule



Hours: Monday – Friday

Time: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Standard Time (CST)



This role requires real-time overlap with our US-based team and clients, so this schedule is fixed.



Commitment:

This is a full-time, exclusive position (40 hours per week) dedicated to our agency. We use proprietary time-tracking software where team members log hours by client throughout the day.



If you are currently managing multiple clients or freelance projects and are not ready to commit exclusively to one team, this role may not be the right fit.



Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)



Build, launch, and optimize campaigns daily in Meta Ads Manager across multiple client accounts



Manage Advantage+ Shopping campaigns and catalog-based Automotive Inventory Ads



Ensure correct creative placement formats (vertical for Stories/Reels, horizontal for Feed/In-Stream)



Modify PSD creative files when needed for different placements and dimensions



Implement and troubleshoot Meta Pixel, Conversions API, and event tracking



Google Ads



Manage Search, Display, YouTube, and Vehicle Listing Ads (VLA) campaigns



Build and optimize Performance Max campaigns with automotive inventory feeds



Connect dealer inventory feeds to Google Merchant Center for VLA campaigns



Configure conversion tracking using Google Tag Manager and GA4



Manage bid strategies, negative keywords, and audience targeting



TikTok Ads



Build and manage campaigns in TikTok Ads Manager



Set up Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) including catalog and inventory feed integration



Install and troubleshoot TikTok Pixel and Events API



Ensure all creative assets follow vertical-first formatting



Reporting & Creative Management



Compile weekly and monthly performance reports across all ad platforms



Work within automotive platforms such as vAuto, VinSolutions, and DealerSocket when needed



Place finished creative assets correctly across ad platforms (format, placement, and dimensions)



Upload final video assets to YouTube with proper metadata and tags



Schedule and boost social media posts while monitoring engagement



What We’re Looking For



Minimum 2 years of paid ads experience for new car franchise dealerships



Direct experience setting up Google Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs) with inventory feeds



Experience with TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) or willingness to learn quickly



Strong proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads Manager



Experience with vAuto and at least one of the following: VinSolutions or DealerSocket



Experience with Google Tag Manager and GA4



Adobe Photoshop skills for modifying PSD ad creative files



Strong attention to detail for creative placements and aspect ratios



Strong written English for daily communication with our US-based team



Reliable internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps) with backup power/internet if possible



Willingness to use our time-tracking system during working hours



Bonus Points



Google Ads certifications (Search, Display, or Video)



Meta Blueprint certification



Experience with automotive CRM platforms (CDK Global, Reynolds & Reynolds)



Experience with Looker Studio / Data Studio for reporting dashboards



Experience building automation tools, AI workflows, scripts, or custom reporting systems



Compensation & Benefits



Salary: $1,500 – $2,000 USD/month depending on experience



Payment Schedule: Paid twice monthly (15th and 30th)



Long-term stability: We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our team



Mentorship: Work directly with our Paid Media Manager and learn our internal strategies



Premium creative: You will be working with high-quality video and photography — not stock templates



Paid Philippine holidays



How to Apply



We receive many applications for this role, so we ask all candidates to answer the following questions in their application message:



Name one new car dealership you have managed paid ads for. What OEM brand(s) did they sell? What was their approximate monthly ad budget? How long did you manage the account?



If you noticed a dealer’s Meta Ads spend tripled over the weekend without a proportional increase in leads, explain step-by-step what you would check first inside Ads Manager.



What time zone are you currently in? Confirm that you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST. If this means working overnight in your location, explain your schedule.



Are you currently working with any other employer or clients? If yes, confirm you will end those engagements before starting.



Have you built or used any AI tools, automations, or workflows to improve ad campaign management? Describe one example if applicable.



Finally, at the end of your application, tell us the name of a restaurant near your home that you would recommend and what you would order there. This helps us confirm you read the entire job posting.



Please send your CV and your answers to the questions above to:

title: Java Developer (Remote)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Java Developer to join our growing engineering team. You will work on building and maintaining scalable backend systems, integrations, and enterprise applications for international clients.



This role is ideal for developers who enjoy solving complex technical challenges, working in collaborative environments, and contributing to modern software architectures — with opportunities to explore AI-driven solutions and emerging technologies.



You will be working with one of our European client and report directly to their management.



Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain backend applications using Java

Build scalable APIs and microservices supporting business-critical systems

Collaborate with product owners, architects, and frontend developers to deliver high-quality solutions

Analyze system requirements and translate them into technical implementations

Optimize application performance, reliability, and security

Participate in code reviews and maintain coding best practices

Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues

Contribute to system integrations with external platforms and enterprise tools

Support continuous improvement of development workflows and DevOps processes



Minimum Requirements

3+ years professional experience in Java development

REST APIs and backend service development

Object-oriented design principles

Databases (SQL or NoSQL)

Version control systems (Git)

Understanding of software development lifecycle and agile methodologies

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

Good written and spoken English communication skills



Nice to Have

Experience or interest in AI / LLM ecosystems

APIs for AI services

RAG systems or AI integrations

Knowledge of Salesforce integrations or development

Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)

Microservices or event-driven architecture experience

title: Technical Support Specialist (CS)
description:
We're hiring a remote Technical Support Specialist to handle customer inquiries via Intercom for our mobile app. You'll respond to tickets, troubleshoot technical issues, onboard new users, handle escalations, and perform detailed investigations when needed.



Responsibilities:

- Respond to customer inquiries via Intercom (technical issues, billing, onboarding, FAQs)

- Troubleshoot technical problems and guide users through solutions

- Onboard new users and ensure smooth setup experience

- Handle escalations professionally and resolve complex issues

- Perform investigations to identify root causes of recurring problems

- Maintain detailed documentation of issues and resolutions



Qualifications:

- 3+ years of experience in technical customer support

- Experience with support platforms (Intercom, or similar)

- Strong written communication skills with attention to detail

- Experience supporting iOS and Android mobile apps is a strong plus

- Technical knowledge (APIs, debugging, developer tools) is a plus but not required

- Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment

- Problem-solving mindset with patience for frustrated customers

- **Required:** Computer running **macOS** (Mac or MacBook)



Performance Targets:

- First response time under 2 hours during working hours

- 90%+ customer satisfaction score



Compensation:

- $4/hour to start

- Remote, flexible part-time hours (20 hours/week) to start with the goal of moving to full-time hours



Payment:

- Payment will be made through PayPal



How to Apply: *Follow these instructions exactly. Do not send a resume or cover letter.*



- Write only **CS2024** in the subject line

- Send a numbered list with only the following:

1. In 2-3 sentences, describe your technical support experience, including platforms and industries

2. Confirm that you have a Mac or MacBook with macOS and specify the macOS version



*(If you do not have a macOS device, please do not apply)*



1. Which support platforms have you used? (Intercom, Zendesk, etc.)

2. Share your best performance metrics from previous roles (CSAT score, response times, resolution rates, etc.)

3. What technical skills or knowledge do you have? (coding, APIs, databases, troubleshooting tools, etc.)

4. Share a brief example of a complex or escalated issue you successfully resolved (include outcome)

5. What is your timezone and availability during normal working hours?

6. Confirm your hourly rate expectations

7. Include your PayPal address for payment

8. Provide a good
 to schedule a brief interview



Generic applications will be ignored.

title: PPC Specialist (Full-Time | Remote)
description:
About Us



We are a well-established UK-based e-commerce company with more than 10 years of experience operating multiple brands across major platforms including Amazon, eBay, Google, and Shopify.



As our business continues to grow, we are looking for a PPC Specialist to take full ownership of our paid advertising efforts across Amazon Ads, Google Ads, Meta Ads, and eBay Promoted Listings.



This is a full-time, long-term remote position, ideal for someone who is experienced, highly detail-oriented, and motivated to directly influence sales performance through effective advertising strategies.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns, including Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display ads



Monitor and adjust eBay Promoted Listings and pricing strategies to maximize visibility and ROI



Create, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, and Performance Max)



Perform ongoing keyword research and competitor analysis



Review and adjust bids, budgets, and campaign structures based on performance data



Conduct A/B testing on ad copy, creatives, and targeting strategies



Prepare weekly performance reports with insights and actionable recommendations



What We’re Looking For



Minimum 2 years of PPC experience, preferably with Amazon Ads and Google Ads



Strong understanding of ACoS, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion tracking



Hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central, Google Ads, and eBay Seller Hub



Ability to analyze campaign performance and make data-driven decisions



Detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple campaigns across different platforms



Strong written English skills for ad copy and reporting



Self-motivated, organized, and capable of working independently



What We Offer



Full-time, long-term remote position



Flexible working hours



Opportunity to work with a stable UK-based e-commerce business with consistent ad budgets and strong product-market fit



13th month salary



13 days of paid holiday (based on full-time hours)



A clear role with opportunities to grow and take ownership of campaign performance



Important Note



We are not looking for someone who outsources or delegates the work. This is a hands-on role, and we expect the person hired to personally manage and execute the tasks assigned.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short message describing your PPC experience across Amazon, Google, Meta, or eBay



Specific examples of campaigns or results you have achieved

title: Customer Follow-Up & Client Support (Phone-Based Role) – Australian Construction Business
description:
We are a Australian company in the doors and windows industry, working with homeowners, builders, and renovators.



We are looking for a friendly, confident communicator from the Philippines who enjoys speaking with customers and building rapport over the phone.



This is a part-time role (4–5 hours per day) focused mainly on customer follow-up calls and pipeline support.



You will be speaking with Australian customers who have already requested quotes or recently received deliveries.



Your role is to help keep conversations moving forward, answer simple questions, and ensure customers feel supported.



This role suits someone who:



Has excellent spoken English



Is confident and comfortable on the phone



Enjoys friendly conversations with customers



Is organised and reliable



Can manage a simple follow-up pipeline



Responsibilities



Your daily work will include:



• Calling customers who have been sent quotes to confirm they received them

• Answering simple questions and helping clarify next steps

• Booking phone appointments or meetings when required

• Taking notes if customers request changes or need additional information

• Updating our CRM with call outcomes and feedback

• Monitoring a list of quotes to follow up and keep moving forward

• Calling customers after deliveries to check everything went well



Most of the role is relationship-focused phone communication, supported by basic CRM updates and notes.



Working Hours



Part-time: 4–5 hours per day



We are flexible and testing different shifts. Possible schedules include:



• 11:00am – 4:00pm (Australian time)

• 12:00pm – 5:00pm

• 3:00pm – 7:00pm



We will work with the right candidate to find the best schedule.



Requirements



• Excellent spoken English and clear phone voice

• Confident speaking with Australian customers

• Friendly, positive, and professional communication style

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

• Good computer skills and ability to update CRM notes

• Organised and able to manage follow-ups

- Motivated self starter



Highly regarded (but not required):



• Customer service or call centre experience

• Experience supporting Australian clients

• Construction, building, or trade industry exposure

• CRM experience



We are looking for someone who enjoys talking to people and building trust, not just completing tasks.



How to Apply



You may be asked to include the following as part of your application:



A short voice recording introducing yourself



A brief description of any phone-based customer service experience



The phrase “Customer first” at the top of your application so we know you read the full job post.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: PHP Developer for Customizing a Premium Classifieds/Directory Script (zuzana.com style)
description:
Hello,



We are looking for a skilled and reliable PHP Developer to help us launch a professional classifieds and directory platform. To ensure a fast and robust launch, we plan to purchase a premium, high-quality script (such as LaraClassifier, Osclass, or a similar Laravel-based solution) and need an expert to customize it to our specific requirements.



Reference Site: zuzana.com (We are aiming for a similar professional, clean, and high-end aesthetic).



Project Scope & Responsibilities:

1. Script Selection & Installation: Consult with us on the best script to purchase based on our needs, then handle the full installation and server configuration.

2. UI/UX Customization: Extensively modify the front-end (CSS/JS/HTML) to match the professional look and feel of zuzana.com.

3. Feature Configuration: Set up advanced search filters, custom fields for categories, and user profile enhancements (galleries, verification badges, etc.).

4. Monetization & Payments: Configure membership plans, featured listing options (doping), and integrate secure payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, etc.).

5. Performance & Security: Ensure the site is lightning-fast, SEO-optimized, and follows best security practices.

6. Mobile Excellence: Guarantee a 100% responsive and seamless experience across all mobile devices.



Required Skills:

- Proven expertise in PHP and modern frameworks (Laravel is highly preferred).

- Strong front-end skills (Bootstrap, Tailwind, Vue.js, or React depending on the script).

- Previous experience customizing directory, marketplace, or classifieds scripts.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to meet deadlines.



How to Apply:

- Please provide links to at least 2-3 similar projects you have completed.

- Briefly explain which PHP script you would recommend for this type of project and why.

- Start your proposal with the word "PREMIUM" to confirm you have read the full description.



We are looking for a long-term partner for ongoing maintenance and future updates.



Thank you!

title: GoHighLevel Expert — Custom Systems & Webhook Integrations
description:
About Us

We run a growing digital marketing agency that helps contractors and tradespeople in the Netherlands get more leads and manage their business online. Our tech stack is built around GoHighLevel for CRM, automation, and client communication — and we use tools like Lovable to spin up client websites fast.



We're a small, no-nonsense team. We build practical systems that work, and we move quickly. If you like figuring out smart solutions without overcomplicating things, you'll fit in well here.



What You'll Be Working On

We need someone who can take GoHighLevel further than the out-of-the-box setup. Specifically:

- Building and maintaining custom automation workflows (lead follow-up, missed call triggers, pipeline management)

Setting up and troubleshooting custom webhooks to connect GHL with external tools — particularly Lovable and other web apps

- Creating reliable two-way data flows between GHL and third-party platforms

- Configuring pipelines, opportunity management, and CRM structure for multiple client accounts

- Occasional work on sub-accounts, snapshots, and white-label setup





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (not just theoretical, show us what you've built)

- Strong understanding of webhooks, API calls, and how to connect GHL to external systems

- Comfortable with JSON, HTTP requests, and debugging webhook payloads

- Experience with workflow automation inside GHL (triggers, actions, conditionals)

- Reliable communicator, you keep us updated and flag issues early



Nice-to-haves:



- Experience with Lovable or similar low-code/AI website builders

- Familiarity with Zapier, Make, or n8n as middleware

- Background in agency setups (sub-accounts, snapshots, SaaS mode)

- Experience with WhatsApp automation via GHL





How to Apply

Send us a short message with:



1. A brief description of a GHL system you built — what the problem was, what you built, and how it worked

2. One example of a custom webhook integration you set up (what tools were connected, what it did)

3. Your rate and availability

4. A short loom introduction about yourself and why we should hire you!

Vonas Media is a dynamic media company based in Manila, with studios in Makati and San Juan. We are dedicated to creating engaging and innovative content that resonates with audiences worldwide. Our culture is rooted in creativity, collaboration, and a passion for storytelling.

As a Motion Graphics Artist at Vonas Media, you will be responsible for creating compelling motion graphics and video content that aligns with our brand and storytelling objectives. description:

title: Credit Bureau Call Specialist (Customer Service – Credit Repair Industry)
description:
Credit Bureau Call Specialist – Customer Service (Excellent English Required)



EXPERIENCE WITH READING A CREDIT REPORT AND WORKING AT A CREDIT REPAIR COMPANY OR BUREAU



Job Description

We are a growing U.S. credit consulting company looking to hire Customer Service Call Specialists who will assist our team by contacting credit bureaus on behalf of our clients.

This role does NOT require creating disputes. Your primary responsibility will be calling the credit bureaus to request updates, verify information, and communicate with representatives regarding client accounts.

You must have excellent English speaking skills and be comfortable speaking with U.S. representatives on the phone.

Basic knowledge of credit reports and credit repair is required so you can properly understand what you are discussing during the calls.

This is a long-term, full-time work-from-home opportunity with a fast-growing company.

Responsibilities

• Call credit bureaus on behalf of our clients

• Follow scripts and instructions from our internal team

• Ask questions regarding credit report accounts and dispute status

• Communicate clearly with bureau representatives

• Document call results in our system

• Review credit reports to understand accounts being discussed

• Provide updates to our team after each call

Requirements

• Excellent spoken English (very important)

• Comfortable speaking on the phone daily

• Customer service or call center experience

• Ability to understand and read a credit report

• Basic knowledge of credit repair or credit reporting

• Strong communication skills

• Attention to detail when documenting calls

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet work environment

Preferred Experience

• Experience speaking with U.S. credit bureaus or financial companies

• Credit repair industry experience

• Call center background

• Experience reviewing credit reports

Work Details

Full-Time Position

Work From Home

Long-Term Opportunity

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

Your experience with customer service or call centers

Your experience with credit reports or credit repair (if any)

Your internet speed test

To confirm you read the entire job description, start your application with the words: "Credit Specialist Ready."

title: Virtual Assistant — CEO's Right Hand Full-Time | Remote | Beauty Startup
description:
About the Role

We're a fast-moving beauty startup looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to support our CEO. This is a true jack-of-all-trades role — no two days look the same, and you'll be plugged into nearly every part of the business. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, take ownership without being asked twice, and love checking things off a list, this role is for you.

This is a full-time, 8-hour-a-day position. Availability must flex across both West Coast and East Coast hours depending on where the CEO is working from.



Examples of What You'll Own



CEO Calendar Management: Own and maintain the CEO's calendar end-to-end — scheduling, rescheduling, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



Follow-Up Management: Track open threads and ensure timely follow-ups across all ongoing conversations and commitments.

Creator & Influencer Outreach: Manage UGC creator and influencer outreach, including sending contracts, coordinating communications, and keeping workstreams on track.



Recap
s: Send clear, concise recap
s following meetings and calls.



Customer Outreach: Draft and send customer-facing
s with a polished, on-brand voice.

Operational Support: Jump in wherever needed to support day-to-day business operations — this list is a starting point, not a ceiling.





What We're Looking For



Strong written and spoken English — you'll be representing the CEO in communications

Highly responsive and available via Slack during working hours

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable with ambiguity and able to prioritize in a fast-paced environment

Prior experience supporting a founder, executive, or CEO preferred

Experience in beauty, fashion, or creator economy a plus





This Role Is NOT For You If:



You need a lot of hand-holding or direction

You're not comfortable wearing multiple hats

You're not available across time zones when needed

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:
Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)



We are currently looking for a Paid Media Specialist to join our team and help manage and improve paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta platforms 
 & Instagram). This role focuses on using data-driven strategies to increase leads, conversions, and overall campaign performance.



Key Responsibilities



• Create, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns on Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) and Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Conduct research on target audiences, keywords, and competitors to improve advertising strategies

• Monitor campaign performance and continuously optimize ads to meet KPIs such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion rate

• Work with design and content teams to test and improve ad creatives including headlines, visuals, and formats

• Manage advertising budgets carefully to achieve the best possible return on investment

• Set up and maintain tracking using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking systems

• Prepare regular campaign reports and provide insights for performance improvements

• Keep up with updates, trends, and best practices in digital advertising platforms

• Collaborate with internal teams to ensure advertising strategies support overall marketing goals



Requirements



• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field is preferred

• At least 1–3 years of experience in Paid Media or Digital Advertising

• Experience working with Google Ads and
/Instagram Ads platforms

• Strong analytical thinking and ability to interpret campaign data

• Familiarity with analytics, tracking tools, and reporting systems

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines

• Good communication skills and ability to work well within a team



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience with lead generation or e-commerce campaigns

• Knowledge of A/B testing, remarketing, and funnel optimization

• Experience handling medium or large advertising budgets

• Certifications related to Google Ads or Meta advertising platforms



Benefits



• Competitive salary with performance-based incentives

• Opportunity to work with different industries and projects

• Supportive and fast-paced digital marketing environment

• Opportunities for learning and professional growth



How to Apply



If you are interested in this opportunity, please send your CV/Resume to:







Subject line: Paid Media Specialist – Full Name

title: VA / Project Manager / Product Operations Assistant
description:
JustWatch is the world’s leading streaming guide for movies and TV shows, with over 40 million users across 120 countries. Our platform allows users to search more than 100,000 movies and TV shows to find out where they can legally watch them across hundreds of streaming services.



We are looking for a new team member to support the Product side of our operations, helping us manage workflows, user feedback, and internal product processes.



Compensation & Schedule

Starting Rate: $5/hour

Automatic Raise: $7/hour after successful completion of the probation period

Hours: 20–40 hours per week (flexible depending on workload)

Schedule: Flexible, aligned primarily with Philippine working hours



Key Responsibilities



Virtual Assistance / User Communication



-First and Main Responder: Act as the central voice for all JustWatch product issues, handling user feedback tagged for the product team from understanding the problem to confirming having solved the issue. 

-Smart Templating: Create, update, and use macros to ensure swift replies—while keeping responses personalized and avoiding a “robotic copy/paste” feel.

-Resolution & Escalation: Keep our “time to solved” metrics low, and proactively escalate complex tickets to our internal communication channels for advice. 





Project Management / Product Operations



-Bug Tracking: Report, manage and maintain our active bugs in a Kanban board.

-Feature Backlog: Track and organize user feature requests coming from our support system and our social channels.

-Bi-weekly Support Reports: Dropping support issue / feedback summaries twice a week

-Weekly Bug Report: A high-level overview of our current bug list and resolutions.

title: VIDEO EDITIOR - VA - (CapCut & AI Voiceovers) - Stable, Long-Term!
description:
Are you a talented, fast-paced video editor looking for a stable, long-term home?



I am looking for a highly creative Video Editor to join our growing content team! We produce viral, scroll-stopping TikToks and Reels using AI-generated B-roll. We already have a VA generating the raw B-roll clips for us—your job will be to take those raw clips, generate realistic AI voiceovers, and edit everything together into an engaging, fast-paced final video.



If you are a CapCut intermediate / pro level who understands social media pacing, retention editing, and audio syncing, I want you on my team for years to come! We value our tea
mbers and provide great support and a stable income.



Our Hiring Process:

Because video editing is a "show, don't tell" skill, we require a practical Trial Task instead of just reading cover letters. We want to see your actual editing skills!



Step 1: The Trial Task (MANDATORY)

Please click the Google Doc link below for your instructions. It will guide you on how to generate the AI voiceover and edit 2 short trial videos.





Step 2: Submit Your Work

Once you have edited the 2 videos, upload them to a Google Drive folder and include the link in your application message right here on OnlineJobs.ph!



A Quick Note on Attention to Detail:

As mentioned in the Google Doc, please make sure your 2 videos are numbered 1 and 2, and double-check that your Google Drive link is set to "Anyone with the link can view." If the folder is locked, we will instantly reject the application because we cannot review your work!

title: IT Sales Operations Specialist
description:
General Description of Duties:

Serve as a primary support resource for point-of-sale (POS) systems, including troubleshooting software issues, processing updates, and coordinating with vendors on escalations.

Support day-to-day administration and maintenance of the company's ERP system, including user access, data entry assistance, and basic configuration changes.

Manage and resolve incoming IT support tickets related to sales operations, ensuring timely responses and thorough documentation of issues and resolutions.

Develop, build, and maintain training content within the Learning Management System (LMS), including course creation, user enrollment, and reporting on completion metrics.

Collaborate with sales, operations, and training teams to identify technology gaps and translate business needs into LMS training materials or system solutions.

Assist with the testing and rollout of system updates and new software across store locations.

Support integrations and data flow between POS, ERP, and other sales platforms, flagging discrepancies and working with vendors or IT leadership to resolve them.

Help onboard new users to sales and operations systems, providing hands-on training and documentation.

Assist with reporting and data pulls from ERP and POS systems to support sales operations and management decision-making.



Requirements:

Experience supporting or working within POS and/or ERP systems in a retail or sales environment

Familiarity with helpdesk or ticketing platforms (e.g., Zendesk, Jira, ServiceNow, or similar)

Experience creating or administering content within an LMS platform

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple open tickets and projects simultaneously

Solid communication skills with the ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical users

Detail-oriented with a proactive approach to identifying and resolving issues.



How to Apply:

All applicants must complete the following steps:

1. Submit your resume highlighting relevant experience in IT support, sales operations, or systems administration.

2. Record a short video covering: Your experience with POS, ERP, or LMS platforms. Why you are interested in this role.

3. Complete our brief candidate assessment (approx. 7 minutes):

title: HubSpot Specialist
description:
•APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED•



About us:

gigCMO Ltd. is a HubSpot Gold Partner. We are dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Position Overview:

We are currently seeking an adept and proactive HubSpot Specialist to join our team. This role is pivotal in driving automation, streamlining workflows, optimising pipeline strategies, and refining reporting mechanisms within our HubSpot environment.





Key Skills and Responsibilities:

title: Marketing & Sales Outreach
description:
Hi, I'm Andrew. I live in Costa Rica with my wife and 3-year old daughter. 



For work, I coach people who want to shift out of a successful first career and into something that's more aligned with who they are and what they want to offer the world. 



I currently have a client who is a men's divorce coach named Aaron. We've built up his website, his brand, and several marketing strategies but it's been hard for him to follow through on strategies because of his existing work / family life. 



Aaron's looking for men who are going through divorce. With that in mind we need help... 



1. Researching and reaching out to Divorce Lawyers / Divorce Law Firms / Divorce Mediators in Northern California to set up meetings with Aaron and to discover ways of working together. Our ideal is that they would send us clients. But we also think there's a way to offer group coaching to their most challenged clients. 



Our success metric is how many calls you book for Aaron or myself with lawyers who are a good match. 

Outreach will be via phone and via
. 



2. Planning, researching and reaching out to relationship influencers, podcasts, personalities, etc. to get Aaron booked as a speaker about men going through divorce. Part of this will be to review other influencers and to see where they've appeared online (YouTube, Instagram, Podcasts, etc.). We're open to other ways of driving traffic to Aaron's site as well based on your past experience. 



Our success metric is number of booked conversations with Aaron. 

Outreach will be via
, and DM. 



If we can validate this strategy, then we'll work with you to scale up Aaron's offerings and drive sign-ups to his program. Ideally we then have you scale us up from CA to the rest of the US.

title: LinkedIn Engagement and Community Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a 
munity Manager with a proven track record to lead and enhance our social media presence on LinkedIn. This role is pivotal in driving brand visibility, fostering meaningful engagement, and contributing to business growth. You will work closely with our content and copywriting teams to transform content into engaging LinkedIn posts, strategically incorporating tags, hashtags, and other platform-specific features. If you are looking for a traditional "lead generation" role, this position is not for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Content Management: Collaborate with our content and copywriting teams to adapt and optimise content for LinkedIn, ensuring posts are engaging and aligned with our strategic goals. This includes selecting appropriate tags, hashtags, and other LinkedIn features to maximise reach and impact.

Engagement and Community Building: Actively engage with new and existing audiences by initiating conversations, tagging relevant individuals and organisations, and fostering meaningful interactions that drive brand awareness and community growth.

Trend Monitoring and Adaptation: Stay ahead of industry trends and LinkedIn platform updates, using insights to recommend new strategies and content formats that keep our brand relevant and engaging.

Performance Analysis: Regularly track and analyse LinkedIn metrics, providing actionable insights and reports to refine our content strategy and optimise engagement.

Collaborative Integration: Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure LinkedIn initiatives align with broader marketing strategies, contributing to the overall success of our campaigns.

Profile Optimisation: Continuously review and optimise LinkedIn profiles to maximise visibility, reach, and impact across all our LinkedIn activities.

Responsive Communication: Manage inquiries and feedback on LinkedIn promptly and professionally, ensuring our community feels heard and valued.



Key Skills and Competencies:



LinkedIn Expertise: Deep understanding of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices, with at least 2 years of professional experience managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Content Optimisation: Ability to work with content and copywriting teams to turn content into engaging LinkedIn posts, utilising tags, hashtags, and other features to enhance visibility.

Analytical Mindset: Proficient in using LinkedIn metrics and analytics to drive performance improvements and inform content strategies.

Collaborative Spirit: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams, integrating LinkedIn efforts with broader marketing and business goals.

Proactive and Trend-Focused: A keen eye for spotting emerging trends on LinkedIn and the initiative to implement them in our strategies.

Strong Communication: Excellent written communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity, creativity, and attention to detail.

Organisational Skills: Capable of managing multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while maintaining a high level of quality and consistency.



Qualifications and Experience:



Professional Experience: Minimum of 2 years managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

Platform Proficiency: In-depth knowledge of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices.

Content Optimisation: Experience in adapting and optimising content for LinkedIn to enhance engagement.

Analytical Skills: Demonstrable experience with LinkedIn metrics and analytics for performance tracking and improvement.

title: Product Manager - SaaS
description:
gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic Product Manager to lead and enhance our Digital Church Platform®. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the product development lifecycle, managing development resources effectively, and ensuring rigorous final testing processes before releasing software updates. You will also play a critical role in translating the strategic vision held by the founder into actionable roadmaps and product deliverables.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage the Product Development (PD) pipeline, ensuring alignment with organisational goals.

- Prioritise and allocate development resources efficiently to align with strategic priorities.

- Conduct comprehensive final testing and quality assurance to guarantee smooth, error-free software updates before public release.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver product enhancements that meet user needs and drive platform adoption.

- Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding project timelines, milestones, and release schedules.

- Translate strategic vision and high-level ideas from leadership into actionable product roadmaps, user stories, and specifications. 

- Facilitate clear and consistent communication between non-technical stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring all parties are aligned.

- Set up and manage internal systems (e.g. Basecamp and HubSpot) to track backlog, sprints, and milestones.

- Gather feedback from churches and users to shape future features and improvements. 

- Monitor product performance or user feedback loops to inform decisions and prioritisation. 

- Monitor incoming requests via helpdesk and chat channels, triage issues, and ensure timely resolution either directly or by coordinating with the development team.



Qualifications:



- Proven experience in Product Management, ideally within digital platforms or SaaS environments.

- Strong organisational skills with an ability to manage multiple development priorities simultaneously.

- Exceptional attention to detail, particularly in software testing and quality assurance.

- Demonstrable capability in managing software product lifecycles effectively.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, able to engage stakeholders at various levels.

- Previous experience in digital community platforms or faith-based digital services is advantageous but not essential.

- Experience writing product requirements, specs, and user stories to support development.

- Understanding of user needs in faith-based or nonprofit contexts, particularly around compliance, admin, or community tools, is highly desirable. 

- A mindset geared toward scalability, continuous improvement, and hands-on problem solving in an early-stage SaaS environment.



Application Requirements:



- This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job. To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 

- Incomplete submissions will not be considered.



Compensation: Php 30,000 - 40,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: Direct Response Editor VSL
description:
We are looking for an experienced Direct Response Video Editor who understands performance marketing and knows how to edit videos that convert.



You will receive finished copywriting scripts for VSLs (Video Sales Letters) and your job is to turn them into engaging videos by selecting and editing the right B-roll footage for each scene.



The videos are typically 1–5 minutes long and follow a structured direct response format used in Meta and TikTok ads.



Responsibilities:



• Edit high-converting Direct Response VSL videos (1–5 minutes)

• Add relevant B-roll footage for each scene based on the script

• Sync visuals with voiceover and captions

• Maintain strong pacing, pattern interrupts and engagement

• Deliver videos optimized for paid social ads (Meta / TikTok)



Requirements:



• 2+ years experience editing direct response or performance marketing videos

• Understanding of VSL structure, hooks, pacing and retention

• Ability to source and integrate high-quality B-roll quickly

• Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects or similar tools

• Fast turnaround and ability to follow structured scripts



This is a long-term opportunity for editors who understand direct response marketing and performance creatives.



*a bonus if is if you : Ideally also experience creating direct response graphics such as captions, hooks, callouts and other on-screen elements that improve engagement and conversions

title: Direct Response Copywriter (Meta Ads) (In German)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Direct Response Copywriter who knows how to write high-converting Meta ads for e-commerce brands.



This is not a content writing role. We are looking for someone who understands performance marketing, hooks, customer psychology and conversion-focused copy.



Your main task will be writing ad scripts, hooks and primary texts for Meta ads, which will later be turned into video creatives.



You should also be comfortable doing product and market research, analyzing competitors, and using tools like the Meta Ad Library to identify winning angles and ad concepts.



Responsibilities



• Write high-converting Meta ad copy (Primary Text, Headlines, Hooks)

• Write video ad scripts (30–120 seconds) for performance creatives

• Research competitors, customer pain points and winning ad angles

• Use tools like the Meta Ad Library to find inspiration and trends

• Develop multiple hook variations for creative testing

• Work with editors to translate scripts into engaging video ads



Requirements



• 2+ years experience in Direct Response Copywriting

• Strong understanding of Meta Ads and paid social creatives

• Experience writing UGC ad scripts or short VSL-style creatives

• Ability to perform research on competitors and ad creatives

• Familiar with tools like Meta Ad Library and ad research methods

• Strong understanding of customer psychology and conversion copy



Bonus (Preferred)



• Experience with Direct Response frameworks (VSL, PAS, AIDA, etc.)

• Experience working with e-commerce brands

• Experience with creative strategy and testing ad angles



To apply



Please send 2–3 examples of Meta ad scripts or creatives you have written that performed well.

title: Marketing Agency Operations & Account Manager
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing digital marketing agency that helps businesses generate leads through paid advertising.



We are looking for a highly organized Operations & Account Manager who will help run the day-to-day operations of the agency while managing client communication and reporting.



You will work directly with the founder and campaign manager to ensure campaigns run smoothly and clients receive excellent service.



This is a long-term role with growth opportunities for someone who enjoys building systems and managing operations.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Communication



* Respond to client
s and messages

* Send campaign updates and monthly reports

* Schedule client calls when needed

* Ensure clients feel supported and informed



Operations & Project Management



* Manage tasks inside ClickUp, Asana, or similar tools

* Coordinate work with the campaign manager

* Track deadlines and campaign launches

* Ensure projects are completed on time



Client Onboarding



* Send onboarding forms to new clients

* Collect account access and assets

* Prepare campaign launch checklists



Performance Monitoring



* Monitor campaign KPIs such as leads, CPL, and conversions

* Flag performance issues to the campaign manager

* Ensure reports are accurate and delivered on time



Client Success



* Maintain strong client relationships

* Identify opportunities for account growth

* Ensure clients are satisfied with the service



REQUIREMENTS



Must Have



* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong organization and project management skills

* Experience working with a digital marketing or PPC agency

* Experience with ClickUp, Asana, Trello, or similar tools

* Ability to manage multiple clients and projects



Nice to Have



* Basic knowledge of Google Ads or PPC

* Experience with Looker Studio or marketing reporting tools

* Client success or account management experience



WORK SCHEDULE



Full-time position (40 hours per week)

Must have 6–8 hours overlap with PST time zone.



SALARY



$1,500 – $2,000 USD per month depending on experience.



HOW TO APPLY



To apply for this role, please follow these instructions carefully.

1) Record a Loom video (2–3 minutes).

In the Loom video, please answer the following:

-Introduce yourself and your background

-Describe your experience working in a marketing or PPC agency

- What was your role in that agency?

-Explain how you would organize onboarding for a new client to ensure campaigns launch smoothly

2) Start your Loom video by saying:

"Hi, my name is ___ and I am applying for the Operations & Account Manager role."

3) Include the word SYSTEMS at the beginning of your application message so we know you read the job description.

4) Resume 





IMPORTANT NOTE



Agency experience is required. Please do not apply if you have never worked inside a digital marketing agency.

title: Digital Growth & Donor Relationships Specialist
description:
The Mission

We are seeking a high-performance, results-oriented Digital Growth Specialist to serve as the engine behind our donor engagement and brand visibility. This is not a "task-taker" role; we are looking for a Digital Architect who can leverage AI and modern tech stacks to drive fundraising and expand our global reach. You will be responsible for the seamless integration of our CRM, marketing, and web platforms to ensure every donor feels valued and every campaign hits its target.



The Core Tech Stack

CRM: Bloomerang

Fundraising: Givebutter

 Marketing: Mailchimp

CMS: Prismic (Headless CMS)

Social Media: Instagram, YouTube,

Design & AI: Canva, Adobe Suite, ChatGPT/Claude/Midjourney



Primary Responsibilities

1. Donor Relationship Management (CRM)

Manage the Bloomerang database with 100?curacy; ensuring all gifts from Givebutter are synced and acknowledged.

Segment donor lists for targeted appeals and monthly partner updates.

Generate weekly reports on fundraising progress toward our $10k+ monthly goals.

2. Multi-Channel Marketing & Design

Graphic Design: Create high-impact social media assets,
 headers, and campaign flyers that align with our brand identity.

 (Mailchimp): Draft, design, and schedule weekly newsletters and urgent "Call to Action" blasts.

Social Media: Execute a content calendar across IG, FB, and YouTube. This includes video clipping for Reels/Shorts and engaging with the community.

3. Website & Digital Maintenance

Perform "Hands-On" updates to our website via Prismic, ensuring all event dates, partner logos, and landing pages are current.

Troubleshoot display issues and coordinate with the web team for structural changes.

4. AI-Driven Efficiency

Utilize Generative AI to draft copy, brainstorm campaign themes, and automate repetitive data tasks.

Stay on the cutting edge of AI tools to increase the "Velocity" of our output without sacrificing quality.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: 2+ years in a digital marketing or VA role, preferably for a non-profit or ministry.

Technical Proficiency: Proven experience with Bloomerang, Mailchimp, and Givebutter is highly preferred.

Communication: Exceptional written English skills with a "Servant’s Heart" tone.

Aesthetics: A strong eye for clean, modern graphic design.

Reliability: High-speed internet and a dedicated workspace for real-time collaboration.



Compensation & Benefits

Monthly Salary: $500 USD.

Environment: Work with a global team of high-level executives and innovators.

Growth: Hands-on experience with emerging AI technologies and enterprise-grade software.



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit:

Your Portfolio (Graphic Design and Social Media examples).

title: EXPERIENCED VIRTUAL ASSISTANT // INSTAGRAM APPOINTMENT SETTER
description:
We are hiring a proactive, fast-thinking appointment setter to turn new Instagram followers into booked calls with our founder. If you understand social media culture, move with speed, and know how to turn conversations into conversions, this is for you.



THE ROLE

You will be the first point of contact for new followers. Your job is simple: qualify, build rapport, and convert them into booked calls. You will:



• Message new followers daily and convert them into booked calls

• Speak in the founder’s voice and maintain a high-authority brand presence

• Keep prospects engaged and prepped before the call

• Reply to inbound DMs and comments

• Upload content to Instagram

• Track daily numbers and performance in our internal tracker



Full training, scripts, and support are provided. Experience is preferred.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

• You will never run out of leads. We run paid ads to the account, so you will always have fresh conversations and volume to work with.

• No calling or video needed. Messaging only.

• Your earning potential is directly tied to your speed, hunger, and performance.



WHAT WE EXPECT

This is not a “reply when convenient” role. You must be active every day, Monday to Sunday. In DMs, speed matters. If you are slow, you lose the lead.



We want someone who:

• Takes initiative and does not wait to be told what to do

• Moves fast and thinks creatively to convert conversations

• Is social-media and culture savvy

• Wants to make real money and treats this like a performance role, not a hobby



PAY & GROWTH OPPORTUNITY

• Earning potential: $2,000–$3,000/month

• Base salary: starts at $1,000/month (depends on experience)

• Commission paid per qualified booked call you secure

• Included paid training for ongoing skill development



I put this here so I can tell if you actually read this post, and if you're paying attention to details. In your application include the word APPLES anywhere so I know you've read it and are switched on :)



WORK HOURS

• Full time

• Core hours: 12pm–9pm UK time

• Work from anywhere – reply from your phone on the go



This role is for someone hungry to maximise commissions and win. If you're looking for slow-paced, low-effort work, this is not a fit.



REQUIREMENTS

• Strong written English

• Smartphone with Instagram

• Laptop for content uploads and meetings



To apply: Please
 me a short Loom video, in the video tell me a bit about yourself, why you're applying for this role, and what your biggest motivation is right now. Ensure your video starts with the word APPLES.

title: A-Player E-commerce Operations / Backend Manager (Shopify Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for an elite, highly experienced Backend Operations Manager to take the reins of our fast-growing general fashion dropshipping business.



We are not looking for a basic virtual assistant. We are looking for an "A-Player"—a proactive leader who treats the business as if it were their own. You will be the operational backbone of the company, overseeing everything from A to Z across multiple Shopify stores, organizing the team, and ensuring our backend runs like a well-oiled machine.



What You Will Do:



Total Backend Management: Oversee the day-to-day operations of multiple Shopify fashion dropshipping stores from start to finish.



Team Leadership: Manage, organize, and train our team of assistants and support staff. You will be their main point of contact and standard-setter.



Process Optimization: Identify bottlenecks and write clear, scalable Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for the team to follow.



Quality Control & Troubleshooting: Handle escalations, monitor fulfillment processes, and proactively solve problems before they impact the customer.



Total Operational Control: Manage the daily flow from top to bottom—including daily product quotations, supply chain management, customer service oversight, and store settings. You will monitor employees, deliver regular performance reports, and proactively provide suggestions to constantly improve and grow the business.



Who You Are:



An E-commerce Veteran: You have extensive, hands-on experience specifically in general fashion dropshipping. You know the unique challenges of the apparel niche (sizing, suppliers, quality control, seasonal trends).



A Proven Leader: You have a track record of successfully managing teams and juggling multiple e-commerce stores simultaneously.



Highly Autonomous: You don't wait to be told what to do. You are highly organized, detail-oriented, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.



A Systems Thinker: You know how to build structures, organize workflows, and document processes clearly.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have a strong attention to detail and have read this entire post, please include the word orange at the very beginning of your application. Applications without this will be immediately ignored.



Please answer the following questions in your application:



What specific fashion dropshipping stores have you managed or worked with in the past? (Please provide links or detailed descriptions of the niche and scale).



Describe a time when you stepped in to fix a chaotic backend or team situation. What steps did you take to organize it?



Have you ever written SOPs for an e-commerce team? Briefly explain your process for creating one from scratch.



How many Shopify stores have you managed simultaneously, and what was your strategy for keeping everything organized?



Why do you consider yourself an "A-Player" in the e-commerce space?



Note: If you are not A player, DO NOT APPLY!
