title: Lead Generation Specialist (American Accent Needed)
description:
Company: 

Website: 

Compensation: $800/month

Hours: 40 hours/week

Location: Remote

Type: Full-time



Please answer this form to be considered: 



About 


 is a wholesale liquidation marketplace that connects resellers, retailers, and entrepreneurs with surplus merchandise sourced directly from major retailers — including Amazon, Walmart, Target, and Costco. We specialize in truckloads of returns, overstock, salvage, and shelf-pull inventory, distributing to buyers across the globe. Our mission is straightforward: cut out the middleman and give buyers access to quality merchandise at unbeatable prices. As we grow our customer base, we're building out our team with people who can help us connect with new buyers and expand our reach.



Role Overview

We're looking for a confident, quick-thinking Lead Generation Specialist to reach out to prospective customers, introduce them to our liquidation programs, and generate interest in our inventory offerings. This is not a scripted call center position — you'll need to read the conversation, think on your feet, and adapt your approach to each prospect. You'll be the first voice of 
, and your ability to communicate persuasively and intelligently will directly impact our sales pipeline.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Lead Generation & Calls

• Conduct outbound calls to prospective buyers to introduce 
 and its merchandise programs

• Qualify leads and assess interest in wholesale liquidation truckloads and inventory offerings

• Engage prospects in natural, unscripted conversations — tailor your approach based on their responses

• Handle objections confidently and keep conversations moving productively

Follow-Up & Pipeline Management

• Follow up consistently with warm leads to move them through the sales funnel

• Handle inbound inquiries and provide clear, helpful information about available inventory and pricing

• Log all outreach activity and keep contact records up to date

Coordination & Reporting

• Report outreach progress and lead status to the team on a regular basis

• Stay updated on current inventory, pricing, and promotions to speak accurately with prospects



Requirements

• Impeccable American English accent — this is a strict requirement for all voice interactions

• Strong verbal communication skills with the ability to hold natural, engaging conversations

• Quick thinker who can handle unexpected questions and objections without a script

• Persuasive and personable — comfortable building rapport with strangers over the phone

• Self-motivated and results-driven with a proactive attitude toward outreach

• Organized and reliable with the ability to manage a consistent volume of calls and follow-ups

• Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls



Nice to Have

• Previous experience in lead generation, telemarketing, sales, or a customer-facing role

• Familiarity with wholesale, liquidation, reselling, or e-commerce

• Experience using CRM tools or outreach platforms



Compensation

• $800/month for 40 hours/week

• Fully remote — work from anywhere

• Stable, long-term full-time opportunity

• A role where your communication skills directly drive company growth

title: Executive Assistant for an online education business
description:
I run a fast-growing online education business and I’m looking for a highly capable right hand to work directly with me.



This is not a typical VA job.



Part of the role is traditional assistant work, but a large part of it is helping organise the business, solve problems, coordinate specialists, and keep operations running smoothly.



If you need constant instructions or supervision, this role will not be a good fit.



If you’re the type of person who enjoys figuring things out, improving systems, and getting things done, you will likely do well here.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing



Some tasks will include:



• sending and scheduling
 campaigns

• managing marketing automations

• organising calendars and appointments

• responding to prospect
s

• confirming booked calls

• uploading social media content

• preparing presentations and documents

• supporting live webinars

• helping manage our community



Other parts of the role will involve solving operational problems.



For example I might say:



“Our GoHighLevel setup is messy. We should fix it.”



Your job would be to:



• audit the system

• figure out what’s broken

• research solutions

• find specialists if necessary

• interview freelancers

• gather quotes

• organise options clearly

• recommend the best solution

• coordinate implementation



You don’t need to be the technical expert, but you must be capable of figuring things out quickly.



AI & Automation



AI and automation are becoming an important part of how we run the business.



You should be curious about tools that improve efficiency and reduce manual work.



This might involve researching or experimenting with AI tools for:



• automation

• content workflows

• research

• productivity

• operations



Tools We Use



You may interact with tools like:



• GoHighLevel

• Zapier

• Kit / ConvertKit

• webinar platforms

• CRM systems

• AI tools



You don’t need to know all of these already, but you must be comfortable learning new tools quickly.



Important Expectations



This role requires ownership and flexibility.



This is not a traditional Monday–Friday 9–5 job.



The business serves a US audience and operates around launches and webinars.



There may be times where we need to communicate outside typical hours (for example a Sunday discussion before a launch). The expectation is simply that important work gets handled when it needs to be handled.



Full-Time Commitment Required



This role is full-time and exclusive.



If you currently manage multiple clients or run freelance services on the side, this will not be a good fit.



We are looking for someone who is willing to fully dedicate their professional focus to this role.



Who This Role Is For



This role tends to work best for someone who is:



• extremely organised

• highly resourceful

• comfortable with technology

• proactive and self-directed

• a strong problem solver

• able to manage multiple moving parts

• interested in business and operations



You should be comfortable working independently without needing constant supervision.

title: Canva Training Video Editor (Unlimited Hours - Milestone-Based Compensation)
description:
ABOUT VSL

Vanderburgh Sober Living is a US-based nonprofit organization that supports addiction recovery group homes across the United States. We exist to make community-based sober housing more accessible, and we do this by equipping and supporting local operators through shared standards, tools, and services.



WHY WORK HERE?

We pay well and treat our team with respect and transparency. Our VAs have real growth opportunities and a voice in how work gets done. We do not micromanage or use invasive time trackers because we hire professionals and trust them to perform. In return, we expect high standards, strong execution, and consistent follow-through. We are not building a revolving door of short-term hires. We are building a long-term team of A-players who take ownership, deliver results, and want to grow with a mission-driven organization. Learn more: 
/how-we-work-with-vas/



POSITION SUMMARY

We are hiring a Canva-based Video Production VA to build simple training videos using a structured workflow we have already developed. You will take a finalized WAV narration file and turn it into a complete training video using stock photos, stock footage, captions, and background music inside Canva. This role focuses on production and consistency. The system is already designed; your job is to execute it accurately and efficiently. This is a project-based role paid per video produced. The initial project will run for several months and may lead to long-term or full-time work for high performers.



DUTIES

-- Build training videos inside Canva using a provided WAV narration file and project instructions.

-- Place VSL stock photos and Canva stock video clips to visually support the narration.

-- Apply subtle pan and zoom effects to photos to create smooth visual movement.

-- Source appropriate Canva stock footage when visuals are not already provided.

-- Generate captions using Canva Auto Caption and clean punctuation and formatting.

-- Add soft background music and balance volume so narration remains dominant.

-- Maintain simple slide pacing by aligning visuals with natural narration breaks.

-- Perform a final quality check before export to ensure visuals, captions, and timing are correct.

-- Export final MP4 files and provide the Canva project link for review.



QUALIFICATIONS

-- Experience with video editing in Canva or creating slideshow-style video content.

-- English: written and conversational fluency.

-- Tools & software: Canva video editor, internet browser, ability to manage online files and links.

-- Skills: strong attention to detail, organized workflow execution, ability to follow SOPs, and good visual judgment when selecting appropriate b-roll based on the training script.

-- Nice-to-have: experience producing training videos, online courses, or educational content.

-- Internet & setup: reliable internet connection, backup plan for outages, quiet workspace.



SCHEDULE

Project-based gig work with flexible hours. No fixed schedule required. Work can be completed on your own time as long as assigned videos are delivered within agreed turnaround times.



COMPENSATION

USD $5–$15 per completed video depending on length and complexity. This is a production-based role, meaning the more videos you complete accurately, the more you can earn. High performers may receive increased rates and consistent long-term production work.



HOW TO APPLY

-- Reply subject: “PANZOOM – [YOUR NAME]”.

-- Include: a short introduction, why you are interested in this role, your experience with Canva video editing, your expected per-video rate, and your weekly availability.

-- Samples: send 2–3 examples of videos you have created in Canva or similar slideshow-style training videos.

-- Voice/video intro: include a short 1–2 minute voice or video introduction describing your experience with video editing.



VIDEO ATTRIBUTES (WHAT YOU WILL BE PRODUCING)

-- Each video will be 6-12 minutes long.

-- Narration audio will always be provided as a completed WAV file.

-- 50% of the visual b-roll will be provided in our VSL image library.

-- 50% of visuals will need to be sourced from Canva’s stock photo/video library.

-- Captions must be generated and cleaned using Canva Auto Caption.

-- Final videos must be exported as 1080p MP4 files.



VIDEO SUCCESS CRITERIA

-- Visuals align naturally with narration and enhance the instructional content.

-- Smooth pan and zoom motion applied to photos without abrupt movement.

-- Balanced mix of stock photos and stock video for visual variety.

-- Background music remains subtle and never competes with narration.

-- Captions are clean, readable, and properly formatted.

-- Final video plays smoothly and follows the provided production workflow.

title: Partnerships & Business Development Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a hands-on partnerships specialist to help us grow through high-impact collaborations with influencers and complementary partners. You’ll be responsible for taking partnership ideas from outreach to execution and measuring results.



What You’ll Do:

- Initial focus is on identifying and reaching out to influencers aligned with our product, working closely with the team to refine outreach and offers.

- Pitch partnership ideas, set up affiliate or cross-promotion deals, and get them live.

- Track performance, optimize what works, and cut what doesn’t.

- Build long-term relationships that lead to repeat collaborations.



Who You Are:

- Has at least 2 years of experience in partnerships, business development, or sales.

- Comfortable with cold outreach and deal conversations.

- Data-driven, outcome-focused, and self-directed.

- Reliable and able to move fast in a startup environment.



Compensation (On-Target Earnings):

- Base pay + performance incentive.

- Typical total earnings range: $5–$15 USD/hour, depending on performance.

- Incentives tied to activated partners, qualified sign-ups, and revenue generated through partnerships.

- Incentive structure and weighting are flexible and negotiable during the application process, based on experience and performance expectations.

- Time commitment: 10+ hours per week, with flexibility to scale based on results.



Application Questions (Required):

- Rate & OTE: What hourly OTE (USD) are you targeting, and why does that range make sense for you?

- Experience: Briefly describe your most relevant partnerships or business development experience. What types of partners have you worked with?

title: Real Estate Listing Coordinator
description:
We are looking for an organized, full-time listing coordinator to join our real estate sales team. Your responsibilities will include overseeing all aspects of seller transactions, preparing listing information, obtaining necessary signatures for listing agreements, and managing the MLS listings and social media postings. In addition, you’ll coordinate cleanings and showings for houses and keep track of the sales activity in the database. The right candidate will be outgoing, organized, goal-driven, and results-oriented. If this job sounds like a great match for you, apply today!



Responsibilities

-Ensure file compliance for the office broker by sending completed listing agreements, sellers’ disclosures, and other documents

-Organize the showing schedule and communicate with other agents to understand the showing best practices and how to increase homes sold

-Allow real estate agents to sell more homes by managing listings for sellers, from initial contact to executed purchase agreement

-Post new listings to social media and in MLS to sell homes quickly and give customers an excellent experience

-Enter sales activity into the client database and track business reports to present progress toward company goals



Qualifications

- Must have prior experience.

- Able to use Excel to display data clearly, as well as use basic computer programs

- Driven to create an excellent customer service experience for each client



If interested, please apply and note your real estate experience and which systems you have used in the past.

title: Virtual FrontDesk For Lash & Brow Salon
description:
We are a premium lash and brow salon in the Dallas-Fort Worth area looking for a sharp, personable Virtual Front Desk Coordinator to be the first point of contact for our guests — from a screen, not a counter. You’ll greet clients via live video, manage bookings, handle check-ins and checkouts, follow up on leads, and keep the front-of-house running smoothly — all remotely. This is not a passive monitoring role. You are the face and voice of our salon. You’ll be on-camera greeting every guest who walks through the door, answering phone calls, and proactively reaching out to prospective and lapsed clients. If you’re warm, organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a client-facing role, this is for you.



What You’ll Do

Live Guest Experience (During Salon Hours)

• Greet every guest via live video screen as they enter the salon — warm, professional, by name when possible

• Check clients in and out through Mindbody, confirm services, and process payments

• Prebook next appointments before the client leaves, maximizing retention

• Answer incoming phone calls, respond to inquiries, and route messages to stylists

• Monitor the lobby and alert stylists when their next client has arrived

• Handle walk-in inquiries and membership questions with confidence

Lead Management & Outreach (During + Off-Hours)

• Respond to new leads (web inquiries, social media, Google Ads) within 1 hour during business hours

• Follow up with prospective clients via text,
, and phone to convert leads into booked appointments

• Reactivate lapsed members (60+ days since last visit) with personalized outreach

• Contact no-shows and late cancellations to rebook

• Send appointment reminders and pre-visit confirmations

Membership & Revenue Support

• Explain membership benefits to new and prospective clients

• Track upcoming membership renewals and proactively follow up

• Request Google reviews from clients after their visit

• Support retail product recommendations at checkout when appropriate

Administrative

• Maintain accurate client records in Mindbody

• Flag scheduling conflicts, double-bookings, or coverage gaps to the owner

• Track daily check-in/checkout completion and report any discrepancies

• Assist with light social media tasks (posting, responding to DMs) if needed

Requirements

Must Have

• Excellent spoken and written English — neutral accent preferred; you’ll be on video with US-based clients

• Reliable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps) and backup connectivity plan

• Professional home setup: quiet environment, good lighting, clean background

• HD webcam, quality headset with microphone, and a computer capable of running video + Mindbody simultaneously

• Experience with appointment scheduling or salon/spa/clinic front desk operations

• Strong proficiency with cloud-based software (CRM, booking systems, Google Workspace)

• Available to work US Central Time hours (salon typically operates 9 AM – 7 PM CT)

• High attention to detail, especially around client names, preferences, and appointment accuracy

Nice to Have

• Experience with Mindbody, Vagaro, Booker, or similar salon management software

• Background in beauty, wellness, or hospitality industry

• Experience with lead follow-up, outbound calling, or appointment setting

• Familiarity with membership-based businesses and recurring revenue models

• Basic knowledge of lash extensions, brow services, and beauty terminology

Data Privacy & Confidentiality

You will have access to client personal information, appointment history, and payment systems. This role requires:

• Signing a confidentiality and data handling agreement before starting

• Accessing client data only through authorized salon systems (Mindbody) — no downloading, copying, or storing client information on personal devices

• Strict adherence to role-based access permissions (you will not have access to full payment card numbers or financial reports)

• Immediate reporting of any data concerns or security issues to the salon owner

Why This Role

You’re not answering phones in a call center. You’re the front desk of a premium beauty salon — clients will see your face, hear your voice, and remember your name. You’ll build real relationships with regular guests, have direct impact on the salon’s growth, and work closely with a small team that values initiative and ownership.

This is an ideal role for someone who wants a long-term, stable remote position with a US-based business where their contribution is visible and valued every single day.



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short video introduction (1–2 minutes) telling us:

1.  A little about yourself and your experience

2.  Why this role interests you

3.  Your home office setup and internet speed

4.  Your availability and desired hours

title: SEO Link Building Specialist – Freelance/Contract (Remote)
description:
About the Project

I'm a self-employed online marketing expert running multiple websites with a strong focus on organic traffic through SEO. My main strategies include high-quality backlink building via guest posts and carefully selected PBN domains.

To scale faster, I'm looking to bring on a reliable freelance contractor to handle the most time-intensive parts of link acquisition. This is a pure contract/freelance position — no employment contract, no benefits, no fixed schedule. You work as an independent contractor and get paid based on hours worked.



Job Description

As an SEO Link Building Specialist, you'll play a crucial role in enhancing my websites' search engine rankings by focusing on high-quality backlink acquisition. Your primary responsibilities will include:



Competitor Link Profile Analysis: 

Research and analyze competitors' backlink profiles using tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Moz. Identify high-value, relevant, and attainable backlink opportunities.



Guest Post Outreach: 

Conduct outreach to website owners for guest posting opportunities. This includes identifying suitable sites, crafting personalized pitches, negotiating terms, and tracking outreach progress to secure placements.



Aged Domain Sourcing for PBNs: 

Scout and evaluate expired or aged domains with strong metrics (e.g., natural backlink profile, clean history, niche relevance). You do not build, host, or manage the PBNs — only research, analyze, and recommend/acquire domains.





Requirements

Proven experience in link building (at least 1 year, ideally with guest posting and/or domain sourcing).

Proficiency with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Majestic, or similar for backlink analysis.

Strong research skills for identifying competitors, outreach targets, and aged domains.

Excellent written communication skills for outreach
s and pitches.





What I Offer

Contract type: Independent contractor / freelance.

Rate: 300 PHP per hour.

Hours & Commitment: Work your own hours, from anywhere. No strict minimum or maximum hours per week — we will negotiate a flexible target (e.g., 10–30 hours/week or specific deliverables) during our discussion to align with project needs and your availability. Scale up/down as suits both of us.

Tools & access: I provide access to Ahrefs and specialized domain tools such as GoDaddy Auctions and Spamzilla. If other tools become necessary, we'll discuss and arrange access as needed.

title: Financial Markets Analyst (Economics / Financial Economics Graduate)
description:
We are currently looking to connect with recent graduates in economics or financial economics who are interested in financial markets, research, and data-driven storytelling.



We are building a small, collaborative team focused on researching UK and international financial markets and turning complex market dynamics into clear, compelling data visualisations.



The goal is simple: take interesting market questions, explore them using credible data, and communicate the insights through thoughtful visual outputs that can be shared publicly.



What the role involves

This role is focused on ideas, research, and market interpretation. You would work closely with a data analyst/visualisation specialist to translate market insights into clear visual formats.



Responsibilities may include:

Identifying interesting themes in global financial markets

Formulating research questions around macroeconomic or market developments

Finding relevant datasets and credible sources

Interpreting economic and market data

Collaborating with a data specialist to develop visual outputs



This opportunity may suit someone who:

Has recently graduated in Economics, Financial Economics, Finance, or a related field

Has a strong interest in financial markets, macroeconomics, and policy

Enjoys research, critical thinking, and idea generation

Is curious about how data can be used to tell clearer market stories

Is comfortable working in a collaborative, startup-style environment



Important note

This is not a permanent or full-time role.



In the first instance, we are exploring informal, ad-hoc collaboration, which could work well alongside further study or an existing role. The focus is on building a strong working partnership and developing high-quality research outputs together.



If this sounds interesting, feel free to reach out or send a short message. We would be happy to have an informal conversation.

title: Executive Recruitment Assistant
description:
Cain & Mann is a boutique executive search firm specialising in placing senior M&A professionals — from Senior to Managing Director level — at investment banks and advisory boutiques across the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). We operate at the top end of the market: our clients are elite firms, our candidates are high-calibre dealmakers, and our process is tight, systematic, and relationship-driven. 



We are hiring an Executive Recruitment Assistant to support our lead consultant in running a high-volume, multi-channel outreach operation. Your job is to help us identify, reach, and qualify senior M&A candidates so that consultant can spend his time on partner-level calls — not on list-building and first-touch messages.

This is not a passive admin role. You will be doing real recruitment work: sourcing candidates from LinkedIn and our internal database, crafting personalised outreach across multiple channels, logging every touchpoint in our CRM, and driving candidates toward a qualification call with consultant.



Weekly Work Rhythm

We run a structured weekly cycle that you will own and repeat every week:



Monday – Tuesday (Sourcing): Find fresh leads. Build targeted candidate lists. Cross-reference against our CRM to avoid duplicates. Verify profiles are current and relevant. Follow Up. 

Wednesday – Friday (Outreach): Execute systematic outreach using provided scripts across LinkedIn,
, WhatsApp for Business, and SMS. Log all activity. Follow up. Push candidates toward a call with Consultant.

title: Applicant Experience Director
description:
About Tadhana

Tadhana is the Philippines’ first exclusive matchmaking platform for extraordinary singles. We combine human insight, curated video profiles, and real connection to create meaningful introductions, not just swipes. We’re an early-stage startup building something that doesn’t exist yet in the Philippine market.



The Role

You’ll be the face of Tadhana for every applicant. Your job is to personally interview each person who applies to join the platform, both in-person in the Manila/Makati area and via video call for applicants outside Metro Manila. You’ll assess whether they’re a genuine fit for our community, guide them through the process, and help accepted members build polished, professional profiles, including photos, video introductions, and written bios. Every interaction should reflect the premium, personal brand we’re building.



What You’ll Do

• Conduct in-person interviews with applicants in the Manila/Makati area

• Conduct video call interviews with applicants who can’t meet in person

• Evaluate each applicant’s sincerity, personality, and fit for the Tadhana community

• Score and document each interview using our internal review system

• Communicate decisions to applicants: acceptance, waitlist, or decline, with warmth and professionalism

• Coordinate interview scheduling and follow-ups

• Provide feedback to leadership on applicant trends and common questions

• Help shape the interview process as we grow and refine our standards

• Direct and coordinate professional photo sessions for accepted female members

• Guide members through filming their 60-second video introductions

• Help craft each member’s written profile and bio so it’s polished and on-brand



Who You Are

• Warm, professional, and an excellent judge of character

• Comfortable conducting interviews both in person and on camera

• Strong communicator in English and Filipino

• Discreet and trustworthy, you’ll be handling personal and sensitive information

• Organized and reliable with scheduling and follow-through

• Passionate about relationships, people, and building something meaningful

• Based in or near Manila/Makati with flexibility to meet applicants at designated locations

• Eye for aesthetics, comfortable directing photos, video, and profile presentation



Why This Role Matters

Tadhana isn’t a dating app, it’s a curated community. Every member is hand-selected, and you’re the person making that call. The quality of our platform depends directly on the quality of your judgment and the experience you create for applicants. This is a foundational role with real impact.

title: TikTok Budget Content Creator - Screen Recording + Video Editing
description:
I run a budgeting content brand on TikTok. I create short-form videos where I break down someone’s monthly budget (income, bills, expenses, debt, savings) while showing the numbers being entered into a budgeting app on screen.



I need someone to handle two things for each video:



1. Screen recording: Open the budgeting app on your computer (web version), follow the budget table I provide, and record yourself entering the numbers into the app. Slowly, cleanly, no mistakes. Use OBS or any screen recorder. You can select dark mode, change the color, etc.



2. Video editing: Take the screen recording, the voiceover audio I provide, and the hook videos I provide. Cut and arrange the hook, speed it up, make edits, (~7 seconds), then the budget screen recording synced to the voiceover. Put it all together into a final TikTok-ready video using CapCut (or similar).



Everything you need for each video will be organized in a shared Google Drive folder. You pick up the materials, do the work, and upload the finished video back to the Drive. Simple and repeatable.



What You Need

• A computer that can screen record clearly (OBS or similar — smooth, no lag, good resolution)

• Experience with CapCut or similar short-form video editing tools

• Attention to detail — numbers must be entered exactly as provided

• Reliable internet and access to Google Drive

• Available to complete 3–5 videos per day on a consistent basis



What I Provide For Each Video

• The full budget story (written text)

• A budget table with exact numbers to enter into the app

• Voiceover audio (pre-recorded)

• Hook videos for the opening of the video (~7 seconds of character footage)

• Access to the budgeting app (test account provided)

• Reference videos so you know exactly how the final product should look



Pay

Starting pay is $0.60 per finished video. This is ongoing, part-time work. The more consistent and reliable you are, the more videos you get. Payment via PayPal, once per month.



Bonus

If videos do well there is a bonus structure and also possibility of raising your pay. Show me that you wanna work and improve, and I can raise your pay!



How to Apply



Please do this task:





Do NOT apply if you are going to copy-paste a generic cover letter. I will ignore it.

title: Short-Term Rental Specialist & Co-Host (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com)
description:
We are looking for a results-driven Short-Term Rental Specialist to join our team. We need someone who isn't just a "task-taker," but a strategist who can help us identify high-potential properties, launch them with high-converting listings, and manage the day-to-day operations to maintain Superhost/Premier Host status.



Key Responsibilities

Property Research: Conduct market analysis (using tools like AirDNA or PriceLabs) to identify profitable locations and estimate ROI.



Listing Creation & Optimization: Write compelling, SEO-friendly descriptions and curate photos to maximize click-through rates across Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com.



Dynamic Pricing: Implement and monitor pricing strategies to maximize occupancy and RevPAR (Revenue Per Available Room).



Guest Management: Handle all communication from inquiry to check-out, ensuring a 5-star experience and resolving issues promptly.



Platform Syncing: Manage multi-calendar syncing via PMS (Property Management Software) to prevent double bookings.



Coordination: Liaise with local cleaning and maintenance teams to ensure the property is guest-ready.



Required Experience

Platform Expertise: Deep knowledge of Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com algorithms.



Tools: Familiarity with tools like Hospitable, Guesty, PriceLabs, or Wheelhouse.



Communication: Exceptional written English and a "hospitality-first" mindset.



Analytical Skills: Ability to look at data and suggest improvements to increase revenue.



Why Work With Us?

We are looking for a long-term partner. As our portfolio grows, your responsibilities and compensation will have the opportunity to scale with us.

title: Billing & Financial Operations Assistant (Part-Time Virtual Assistant)
description:
About Our Organization

Daily Grace Adult Day Health Services is a healthcare program based in Georgia, USA that supports seniors and adults with disabilities through therapeutic day services, community activities, and health support programs.

We are looking for a detail-oriented and organized Virtual Assistant to support our billing and financial operations. This role focuses on maintaining accurate financial records, preparing invoices, and supporting internal accounting processes.

This position works closely with the business owner and bookkeeper.

________________________________________

This role involves financial data accuracy and billing support. We value long-term team members and reliable performance.



Key Responsibilities

Billing & Accounts Receivable Support

• Prepare invoices in QuickBooks Online based on weekly attendance reports

• Record and apply client payments to the correct invoices

• Maintain accurate accounts receivable records

• Identify and flag unpaid or incorrect invoices for review

Financial Data Entry & Organization

• Categorize routine expenses in QuickBooks Online using provided rules

• Upload and organize receipts and financial documentation

• Match transactions to bank and credit card records when appropriate

Reporting Support

• Update weekly Accounts Receivable tracking spreadsheet

• Prepare simple financial summaries for internal review

• Maintain organized digital files for billing and financial records

Program Documentation Support

• Assist with preparing documentation related to the CACFP food reimbursement program

• Organize attendance and meal records for review before submission

Payroll Preparation Support

• Compile employee timesheets for payroll review

• Identify missing or incomplete time records

• Prepare payroll summary reports for processing

Support transportation billing records by tracking invoices and payments related to non-emergency medical transportation services.

________________________________________

Important Boundaries of the Role

This position does not:

• Process payroll

• Submit payroll taxes

• Transfer money or access bank accounts

• Make financial decisions

• Change accounting structures

All financial approvals remain with the business owner and bookkeeper.

________________________________________

Skills & Experience Required

• Experience with QuickBooks Online

• Strong attention to detail

• Experience with data entry or billing processes

• Ability to follow structured procedures

• Strong written English communication

• Organized and comfortable working with spreadsheets

• Reliable internet connection

Preferred but not required:

• Experience with bookkeeping support

• Experience with healthcare or service-based businesses

________________________________________

Personal Qualities We Are Looking For

• Careful and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with repetitive tasks

• Organized and dependable

• Able to follow clear instructions and processes

• Willing to ask questions if something is unclear

This role is best suited for someone who enjoys structured work and accuracy.

________________________________________

Training & Support

You will receive clear training on:

• Our billing process

• Invoice preparation procedures

• Financial documentation organization

• Internal workflows

We value long-term team members and provide clear instructions and support.

________________________________________

How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A short introduction about your experience with billing or financial data entry

2. Your experience using QuickBooks Online

3. Your availability each week

4. The phrase “Accuracy Matters” in the first line of your application (this helps us confirm attention to detail)

________________________________________

Opportunity for Growth

This position may expand in hours and responsibility as the organization continues to grow.

description:
Job Overview

Schedule

title: Strategic Research Virtual Assistant – Partnerships & Lead Expansion (Remote) - ASAP
description:
**Strategic Research Virtual Assistant – Partnerships & Lead Expansion (Remote)**



We are looking for a highly capable **Strategic Research Virtual Assistant** to support the international growth of our company.



We are looking for someone long-term. The role will begin part-time and transition to full-time as the position develops.



Our business works with **international home buyers and investors** who are interested in purchasing real estate in Portugal for both investment and lifestyle purposes. Our typical client is an experienced international investor, entrepreneur, or senior executive who values stability, security, and a structured buying process.



This role focuses on **strategic research and partnership discovery**. The goal is to identify organizations and platforms that already have access to our ideal audience and help us create opportunities to connect with them.



If you enjoy research, business intelligence, and identifying strategic partnerships, this role may be a great fit.



---



**Your Main Objective**



Your primary responsibility will be to **identify companies, organizations, and platforms that have access to high-value international investors** and map potential collaboration opportunities.



You will help build a structured database of potential partners and lead sources that could introduce our services to their audiences.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



• Identify companies, organizations, and platforms that have access to international investors and high-net-worth individuals

• Research and map potential strategic partnerships across multiple industries

• Find companies with communities, databases, memberships, or audiences aligned with our target client profile

• Identify newsletters, platforms, events, and networks where our services could be introduced

• Build and maintain structured databases with hundreds of potential partner organizations and contacts

• Support preparation of outreach messages and partnership introductions

• Continuously identify new channels where our ideal clients are active



This role is about **scale, consistency, and strategic thinking** in identifying opportunities.



---



**Examples of Organizations You May Research**



• Wealth managers and investment advisors

• Private banking institutions

• International tax advisors

• Relocation and mobility companies

• Luxury travel advisors

• Yacht clubs, marinas, and golf clubs

• Luxury car brands and dealerships

• Investment platforms and investor networks

• Expat communities

• Private membership clubs

• Organizers of business or investment events



We also value **creative thinking** in identifying less obvious industries that share the same client profile.



---



**What We Are Looking For**



• Strong research and analytical skills

• Experience with business research, lead generation, or partnership development

• Ability to identify patterns in audiences and industries

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Ability to structure and present research clearly

• Strong written communication

• Proactive and results-driven mindset



Experience in **strategic lead generation, partnership research, or business development support** is highly valued.



---



**What Success Looks Like in This Role**



• Building a large database of relevant organizations and contacts

• Identifying new partnership opportunities consistently

• Expanding the number of potential channels that can introduce us to international investors

• Helping develop a long-term network of strategic partners



---



**To Apply**



Please complete the application form below so we can review your experience.



Application Form:





Please include the following:(which is in the form)

A short introduction about your experience with research or partnership sourcing

Examples of research or lead generation work you have done

The tools you typically use for research (LinkedIn, Apollo, Crunchbase, Google research, etc.)



Due to the number of applications, only candidates who complete the form will be considered.



We are looking for someone who enjoys **strategic thinking, research, and identifying opportunities for growth.**

title: Lead UI/UX Product Designer (AI-First, Full-Time)
description:
Senior UI/UX Product Designer (AI-First) – Eight



Eight is a rapidly growing video-first social app headquartered in Portugal. We are entering a new phase of product development where design quality, user experience, and speed of iteration are central to our growth. We are hiring a Senior UI/UX Product Designer who can take full ownership of our product experience and lead the entire design function with independence and clarity.



This is a senior leadership role for someone capable of elevating Eight’s design standards and pushing the product forward without dependence on founders or engineering for direction.



?



Role Overview



We previously worked with a designer who required significant guidance and hand-holding. We are now looking for someone fully autonomous, proactive, and able to lead the UI/UX team end-to-end.



Your mission is to create a world-class user experience, implement AI-driven design workflows, prototype rapidly, and ensure Eight delivers a seamless, modern, emotionally engaging product.



?



Responsibilities



Leadership & Ownership

 • Lead the entire UI/UX function and set design direction across the company.

 • Operate independently, without requiring continuous supervision.

 • Establish efficient workflows, best practices, and a strong design culture.

 • Ensure design progress happens without founders needing to step in.



End-to-End Product Design

 • Own the full design lifecycle: research, flows, wireframes, prototypes, and final UI.

 • Deliver high-quality mobile designs (iOS & Android) ready for engineering.

 • Build and maintain a scalable design system.



AI-Driven Product Innovation

 • Use AI tools to speed up wireframing, prototyping, testing, and design iteration.

 • Deploy no-code or low-code prototypes to experiment without needing developer builds.

 • Identify and implement new AI tools that make the design process faster and more effective.



Research & UX Strategy

 • Analyze competitors and market trends to identify UX opportunities.

 • Strengthen onboarding, subscription flows, and the core video interaction experience.

 • Apply behavioral and emotional design principles to increase conversion and retention.

 • Present clear UX solutions based on data, psychology, and product objectives.



Cross-Functional Collaboration

 • Work directly with the CEO and CMO to align design with product vision and growth strategy.

 • Collaborate with engineers to ensure accurate implementation.

 • Support marketing with assets and insights tied to acquisition and funnel optimization.

 • Provide design input during roadmap and feature planning.



?



Requirements



Must-Have

 • 5+ years of UI/UX experience, primarily in mobile product design.

 • A strong portfolio demonstrating modern, high-quality mobile interfaces.

 • Expert proficiency in Figma (components, auto-layout, prototyping).

 • Proven ability to work autonomously and deliver at senior level.

 • Experience using AI tools for design, research, or prototyping.

 • Strong understanding of user psychology, onboarding flows, and conversion-focused design.

 • Ability to transform raw ideas into fully polished interfaces.



Nice-to-Have

 • Experience with social, dating, or video-based apps.

 • Familiarity with growth or monetization design.

 • Ability to build interactive prototypes using no-code tools.

 • Experience in fast-growing consumer tech environments.



?



Who You Are

 • Highly autonomous and proactive.

 • Strong problem-solver who brings solutions, not questions.

 • Capable of identifying UX gaps independently.

 • Fast, detail-oriented, and execution-focused.

 • Comfortable leading and shaping a design department.

 • Someone who delivers consistently without bottlenecks or delays.



?



How to Apply



Please send:

 1. Your mobile app portfolio (mandatory).

 2. Links to recent product design work.

        3.     Ai tools and systems you currently use.

title: Head of Marketplaces (Ecommerce - Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



This role is ideal for someone with strong commercial instincts, leadership experience, and hands-on marketplace expertise. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing marketplace operations, and leading strategy across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



- Defining vision, setting priorities, and driving growth across online marketplaces.

- Own overall marketplace strategy and performance (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and future platforms)

- Drive sales growth, profitability, and market share.

- Plan and execute campaigns, promotions, and product launches.

- Optimize product listings, pricing, and assortment.

- Analyze sales data, traffic, and conversion metrics to improve performance.

- Manage marketplace operations including inventory coordination, order fulfillment, logistics, returns, and customer service.

- Monitor competitors and marketplace trends.

- Ensure compliance with marketplace policies and standards.

- Collaborate with the Marketing team to optimize demand, funnels, and conversions while scaling livestream, affiliate, and KOL/KOC commerce.

- Oversee forecasting, performance tracking, and executive-level reporting.

- Communication with Key Account Managers.

- Leading PH team, collaborating with other multicultural teams, and managing external partners.



Qualifications:

- 3 - 5 years proven experience in E-commerce Marketplace Management (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop) or roles as E-commerce Manager or Marketplace Manager.

- Background in fast-growing or high-volume e-commerce businesses.

- Strong understanding of online sales, promotions, and analytics.

- Knowledge of paid ads within marketplaces (Shopee Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Ads).

- Proficient in Google Workspace (especially Google sheets) and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Experience managing multiple SKUs and campaigns.

- Excellent communication and leadership skills.

- Data-driven mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you.

title: High-Ticket Sales Setter & Closer – AI Automation Services
description:
We are looking for an experienced High-Ticket Sales Closer to join our growing AI automation agency.



Our agency helps dental clinics increase patient bookings, capture more leads, and improve their online reputation using AI-powered automation systems.



Many dental clinics lose potential patients because:



Calls go unanswered



Leads are not followed up quickly



They do not consistently collect Google reviews



Our system solves these problems and helps clinics generate more bookings without hiring extra staff.



This is a commission-only role with strong earning potential for motivated sales professionals who are confident speaking with business owners.



What We Sell



We install a Patient Booking & Follow-Up Automation System for dental clinics.



Our system includes:



AI Voice Receptionist



An AI-powered voice receptionist that answers every incoming call, ensuring clinics never miss potential patients.



The AI receptionist can:



Answer patient questions



Book appointments automatically



Capture patient information



Handle multiple calls at once



Operate 24/7



Automated Lead Follow-Up System



Our system automatically follows up with:



People who enquire about dental treatments



Patients who book appointments



Leads that come through online enquiries



This helps clinics convert more enquiries into booked appointments and reduce no-shows.



Google Review Automation



After a patient finishes their appointment, the system sends an automatic SMS with a Google review link.



This helps clinics:



Get more 5-star reviews



Improve their Google ranking



Build trust with new patients



Attract more local customers



Our Client Packages



Our typical package includes:



$2,000 – $3,000 setup fee



plus



$750 monthly maintenance and support



Commission Structure



You will earn:



15% commission on every sale



That means:



$300 – $450 commission per closed client



Example:



If you close 5 clinics per month, you could earn $1,500 – $2,250+ in commissions.



Top performers will have opportunities to grow with the agency long-term.



Your Responsibilities



Speak with dental clinic owners or managers



Understand their current patient booking process



Present our automation system clearly



Handle objections



Close deals with business owners



Maintain communication with our team



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



Has experience closing high-ticket services ($1k+)



Is confident speaking with business owners



Has strong persuasion and communication skills



Is self-motivated and results-driven



Has experience with B2B sales



Experience selling SaaS, marketing services, or automation services is a big advantage.



Probation Period



All new hires will go through a 14-day probation period.



During this time we will evaluate:



Sales ability



Communication skills



Activity and consistency



Successful candidates will continue working with us long-term.



How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience with sales or closing deals



The largest deal you have closed



Your experience with high-ticket sales



A short voice introduction or video introduction



To confirm you read the job description, start your application with the word:



Automation

title: Trading Chart Research & Sync Editor (Content VA) – Remote
description:
Hello — hope you’re doing well!

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



This is a long-term collaborative opportunity for editors who value consistency, creativity, and growth alongside a dedicated team.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



We run a high-quality trading education channel and are looking for a resourceful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can listen to a narrated voiceover, understand the trading concepts being explained, and find (or recreate) charts that perfectly match each segment.



This position blends chart literacy with creative problem-solving — you’ll often need to recognize what’s being discussed even when the term isn’t explicitly stated, and then source or recreate the right chart to visually communicate the concept to viewers.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Responsibilities

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Listen closely to the provided clip and tell the story through accurate, well-timed chart visuals.



Understand the trading term, setup, or market condition being discussed.



Locate, screenshot, or recreate high-quality trading charts that match the narration.



Add relevant effects, transitions, and annotations using Camtasia to enhance storytelling and maintain viewer engagement.



Verify each chart shows the correct instrument, timeframe, and clarity.



Organize and deliver charts in sequence for the video editor to sync.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Requirements

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Strong understanding of core trading concepts (support/resistance, indicators, market structure, patterns, liquidity grabs, etc.).



Ability to deduce and identify setups even when implied in narration.



Hands-on experience with Trading View or similar charting platforms.



Resourceful and precise — able to find the best visual representation, not just the easiest one.



Exceptional attention to detail, timing, and visual storytelling.





________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Platform Requirement

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Camtasia is required for the entire project.



You will be provided with all effects, transitions, and other tools needed to complete the work through our Camtasia Library package.



All work must be created, edited, and exported through Camtasia, ensuring all effects, transitions, and assets are properly embedded in the Camtasia Library Package (.libzip) format.



You may use the free version — a paid license is not required.



Ensure your system can run Camtasia smoothly and handle exporting without lag or crashes.





________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Training & Brand Style

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Full training provided on our chart color codes, formatting, and visual standards.



Access to visual templates to ensure consistency across all videos.



The goal: maintain a clean, professional, and uniform chart style that aligns with our brand identity.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Nice to Have

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Previous experience in trading or finance-related content creation.



Familiarity with educational or YouTube-based video production workflows.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Workload & Pay

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



1 video per month (8–12 minutes each)



(Includes a 1-minute clip workflow to maintain consistency and quality across projects.)



Pay Range: $70 – $150+ per video



Based on:



- Skill level



- Creativity



- Accuracy



- Execution quality



- Turnaround time



- Effort level



The link below showcases the work produced by editors on the team. All of the edits are strong, but each one reflects a different level of dedication, detail, and overall quality — and that’s exactly why we use an incentive-based system. 



The harder you work, and the more accurately and creatively you execute the story using chart visuals and our effects library, the more you earn.







________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Flexible schedule — because we view editors as partners, you’re trusted to manage your own time, work efficiently, and find the pace that suits you best while still delivering within a reasonable timeframe.



________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



How to Apply

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ 



Include the word “RSI” at the top of your application to confirm you’ve read this description.

In your message, please share:



Your experience with trading and charting platforms.



Any examples or samples of your past trading visuals or chart work.



If you have any questions at all , don’t hesitate to ask — we value clear communication and collaboration. 



Thank you for your time.

title: Editor
description:
Video Editor for Football Travel Brand (Cinematic Reels)



I run Tiki Taka Tours, a football travel company that takes amateur teams abroad to play, travel, and experience football culture in places like Portugal and Greece.



I’m looking for a reliable editor to help create cinematic, music-driven Instagram Reels/TikToks using A-Roll from myself, and B-Roll from raw footage from tours.



These are not generic talking-head edits. They’re fast-paced highlight reels designed to build excitement around the football travel experience.



What you'll be editing



~15 cinematic reels per month**

Footage includes:



  * match highlights, celebrations, presentation moments

  * travel moments

  * off-pitch lifestyle footage

  * team moments and atmosphere

* Videos are typically **45-75 seconds**



Your job



* Select and cut the best moments from the footage

* Match cuts to the energy and beat of the music

* Use B-roll to build a cinematic highlight reel

* Keep pacing fast and engaging

* Deliver edits within 24–48 hours of receiving footage



I’ll provide reference videos so you can match the style.



You're a great fit if



* You’ve edited cinematic reels or sports/travel content before

* You understand music-driven editing and pacing

* You’re reliable and consistently hit deadlines

* You’re comfortable working with B-roll heavy footage



To apply



Send:



1. 3 examples of reels or short-form edits you’ve made

2. A short Loom video (1–2 minutes) explaining why you’d be a good fit.



---

Payment



$20–$25 per video depending on experience.

title: Commission Inquiry Coordinator
description:
JOB TITLE: Commission Inquiry Coordinator

REPORTS TO: Director, Revenue Operations



The Commission Inquiry Coordinator plays a critical support role on the Revenue Assurance team, ensuring that open commission inquiries are actively monitored, accurately documented, and promptly communicated. This role is ideal for a highly organized, detail-oriented individual who thrives on process and consistency. By owning the operational upkeep of inquiry tickets, the Coordinator frees the commissions analyst team to focus on high-value analytical and partner-facing work.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES (PH-tailored)



-Monitor the commissions inquiry inbox on a set cadence aligned to US business hours (night shift PH time), triaging updates from distributors (TSDs) and suppliers per SOP.

-Log and update partner-facing tickets in the internal CRM/ticketing tool (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot) with clear notes, correct statuses, and time stamps to meet SLAs.

-Check TSD and supplier portals bi-weekly (or as required), capture evidence (screenshots/files), and document findings in the ticket and tracker.

-Send timely follow-ups to TSDs and suppliers on overdue inquiries; escalate per escalation matrix when response SLAs are missed.

-Recognize issues needing analytical review or partner communication and hand off to the assigned commissions analyst with complete context and attachments.

-Maintain audit-ready records and data integrity across ticketing, spreadsheets, and commission systems; manage file versions in Google Drive/SharePoint.

-Assist with shared inbox management (labels, rules, routing) to direct inquiries to the correct analyst or queue and flag urgent items.

-Prepare and maintain trackers and weekly status reports (volume, aging, response times, resolutions) for the Revenue Operations team.

-Support month-end/quarter-end activities, including bulk ticket updates, portal sweeps, and meeting cut-off timelines.

-Contribute to process documentation and continuous improvement; update SOPs/checklists when changes are implemented.

-Ensure compliance with data privacy and confidentiality requirements (company policies, GDPR/CCPA where applicable).

-Provide clear end-of-shift handovers to ensure continuity between PH and US teams.



QUALIFICATIONS :



-Bachelor’s degree preferred; alternatively, 2+ years of BPO/back-office or
 support experience in operations, billing, finance ops, order management, or similar.

-Strong attention to detail and data accuracy; proven track record handling high-volume, repetitive tasks with minimal errors.

-Excellent written and professional English; comfortable communicating with US-based stakeholders and external vendors.

-Proficiency in Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel (filters, lookups/VLOOKUP or XLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting, data validation).

-Experience with ticketing/CRM systems (e.g., Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot); Jira or ServiceNow is a plus.

-Ability to follow defined SOPs, meet SLAs, and appropriately flag exceptions/escalations.

-Comfortable working across multiple systems and supplier portals simultaneously; fast learner with strong keyboard skills (e.g., 45+ WPM with high accuracy).

-Strong organizational and time-management skills; skilled in maintaining trackers and clear documentation.

-Willing and able to work night shifts aligned to US time zones, including select Philippine holidays and month-end/quarter-end overtime when needed.

-Reliable remote setup (e.g., at least 25 Mbps internet, backup connectivity/power, quiet workspace); or openness to onsite/hybrid as required by the company.

-Familiarity with handling sensitive financial or commission data and adherence to confidentiality/data privacy policies.

-Nice to have: experience in telecom or IT channel environments, revenue assurance, commissions or billing support, and vendor/partner communications.



If you feel you meet the qualifications above, please send your resume to 
 with a cover letter stating why you are the best candidate. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. We will ONLY reach out to qualified candidates. Thank you.

title: Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant to support our accounting and financial operations. The ideal candidate must have strong experience in QuickBooks. Familiarity with ServiceTitan is highly preferred but not required, with the ability to manage invoices, perform reconciliations, and assist with month-end financial reviews.

This role requires excellent organizational skills, can work independently, accuracy, and the ability to work independently while coordinating with internal team members.



???? Key Responsibilities

1. Invoice and Bill Processing

Save and organize all incoming invoices and bills in the proper filing system

Enter invoices and bills into QuickBooks Online accurately

Post transactions to the correct vendor, account, and payment method

Review invoices for errors or duplicates before posting





2. Expense and Transaction Monitoring

Review and categorize bank transactions synced in QuickBooks

Ensure expenses are coded to the correct accounts

Identify missing, duplicate, or incorrectly posted transactions

Perform weekly transaction cleanup and accuracy checks





3. Undeposited Funds Management

Verify payment amounts, applied payments, and balances

Batch and post deposits to the appropriate accounts

Ensure payment records match QuickBooks data



4. Credit Card Management and Reconciliation

Coordinate with team members to obtain monthly credit card statements

Reconcile multiple credit card accounts in QuickBooks

Compare statement transactions against QuickBooks entries

Identify and resolve:

Missing transactions

Duplicate entries

Incorrect expense categorizations

Post any missing transactions

Maintain reconciliation reports using Excel when needed



5. Bank Reconciliation

Reconcile multiple checking accounts monthly

Verify deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and refunds

Ensure balances match bank statements and QuickBooks records

Investigate discrepancies and make corrections



6. Month-End Close Support

Reconcile ServiceTitan revenue with QuickBooks revenue reports

Investigate revenue discrepancies or unusual fluctuations

Assist with adjusting journal entries when required



7. Profit and Loss and Expense Analysis

Run monthly Profit & Loss reports (accrual basis)

Analyze expenses and compare against:

Previous months

Prior year data

Review detailed transactions for:

Correct vendor and account coding

Proper posting dates

Supporting documentation



8. Financial Data Quality Control

Identify and correct:

Duplicate expenses

Personal or non-business expenses

Misclassified transactions

Improper credit card postings

Review and validate large or unusual transactions

Assist with expense adjustments and reclassifications



9. Documentation and Reporting

Maintain supporting documents such as invoices, receipts, and expense records

Document financial variances and unusual transactions

Prepare notes and reports for management review

Flag items requiring approval or follow-up



10. Team Coordination

Communicate regularly with accounting team members

Participate in review meetings and financial presentations

Provide administrative and bookkeeping support as needed



? Required Qualifications

Proven experience as a Bookkeeper

Strong experience with QuickBooks

Experience or familiarity with ServiceTitan (Highly Preferred but not required)

Experience in HVAC industry is a plus

Strong understanding of reconciliation processes

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Strong written and verbal English communication skills



? Preferred Skills

Experience supporting U.S. based businesses

Experience with month-end close processes

Knowledge of accrual accounting

Experience working as a Virtual Assistant or remote bookkeeper



? Work Schedule

Aligned with U.S. business hours – EST Timezone (to be discussed)



???? Work Setup Requirements

Reliable internet connection

Backup power and internet

Quiet and professional work environment

description:
We're Not Looking for a Generic Fitness Coach. We're Looking for a Specialist.Our company is growing fast.

What You'll Be Doing

Assigning and adjusting programs as clients progress

Collaborating with our coaching team to ensure client outcomes are being hit

Maintaining a high standard of program quality across every client you touch





This Role Is For You If...

? You have formal certifications (NSCA, NASM, CSCS, or equivalent) and/or a portfolio of real client transformations

? You're detail-oriented, reliable, and hit your deadlines without being chased

? You treat programming like a craft, not a task

? You're based in the Philippines and available part-time on a flexible remote schedule



This Role Is NOT For You If...

? You only know how to train people like yourself

? You need constant supervision to deliver quality work

? You're looking for a passive side gig with minimal effort

Our clients are paying for transformation. We take that seriously. You should too.



Compensation



Per client / per program basis — the more clients we grow, the more you earn

Part-time, fully remote

Flexible hours — results matter, not clock-watching

Direct path to expanded scope and higher volume as the roster grows





Specializations We're Prioritizing



Body Recomposition

Bodybuilding & Hypertrophy

Holistic & Hormonal Health

Functional Training & Movement Quality



Candidates with depth in 2 or more of these areas will be prioritized.



To Apply

Your availability and current coaching load



Applications without the above will not be reviewed.

title: Facebook Ads Operations Manager
description:
Ads Operations Manager



Overview

We run high-volume direct response advertising across multiple Meta ad accounts and Business Managers.

Due to the nature of our advertising environment, accounts, profiles, and BMs can occasionally face restrictions. Because of this, we operate with multiple profiles, multiple BMs, and multiple ad accounts simultaneously.

The role is primarily operations and infrastructure management.

Your responsibility is to make sure our advertising system continues running smoothly at all times.

This includes setting up accounts, launching campaigns, managing infrastructure, and replacing assets if issues occur.



What This Role Is Responsible For

The role involves managing the entire advertising infrastructure, including:

•
 profiles

• Business Managers

• Ad accounts

• Proxies

• Browser environments

• Campaign launches

• Account replacements when needed

You will be responsible for keeping multiple ad accounts live and operating daily.







Advertising Infrastructure

Our structure typically looks like this:

Example setup:

Profile A

Business Manager 1

• Ad Account 1

• Ad Account 2

• Ad Account 3

• Ad Account 4

Profile B

Business Manager 2

• Ad Account 5

• Ad Account 6

• Ad Account 7

• Ad Account 8

Profile C

Business Manager 3

• Ad Account 9

• Ad Account 10

• Ad Account 11

• Ad Account 12



Each profile runs inside a multi-profile browser environment using proxies.



Infrastructure Setup Process

When new profiles are purchased from a provider, you will be responsible for setting up the environment.

Typical setup process:

Receive profile credentials and Business Manager access.

Create a new browser profile inside the browser environment.

Attach the correct proxy.

Log into the
 profile.

Confirm Business Manager access.

Ensure ad accounts are connected to the correct Business Manager.

Connect the correct pixel to each ad account.

Ensure permissions are correct.





Ad Account Structure

Each profile usually manages multiple ad accounts.

Typical structure:

• 3 profiles

• 4 ad accounts per profile

• Multiple Business Managers

This allows the advertising system to continue operating even if individual assets face restrictions.





Campaign Launch Process

When a new ad account is ready:

Launch campaigns at low spend.

Start with 2–3 main creatives.

Monitor for rejections or review issues.

If ads are approved and running smoothly, scale gradually.

Typical scaling path:

Start Low spend testing > Then increase spend incrementally

Eventually reaching up to $5,000 daily spend per ad account.

Scaling should be done gradually and carefully.

Ad Account Monitoring

Daily monitoring includes checking:

• ad approvals

• campaign status

• account health

• spend levels

• pixel tracking

You will also ensure:

• accounts remain active

• campaigns remain live

• budgets are running correctly

Account Funding

You will:

• monitor daily spend

• report how much funding is required

• notify the team of upcoming funding needs

Actual top-ups will be handled by management, but you must report required amounts clearly by End of day.

Handling Common Issues

Due to the nature of Meta advertising, several issues may occur.

You will need to manage situations such as:

Rejected Ads

You will follow our rejection SOP which includes:

• duplicating ads

• adjusting metadata

• relaunching ads

Ad Account Restrictions

If an ad account is restricted:

• check the reason

• complete ID verification if required

• obtain verification ID from the profile provider if necessary

Profile Lockouts

Sometimes profiles become locked.

In this situation you will:

• replace the profile

• reconnect assets if required

• relaunch campaigns

Business Manager Restrictions

If a Business Manager becomes restricted:

• move assets if necessary

• replace BMs when needed

• ensure ad accounts continue running



Daily Responsibilities

Typical daily tasks include:

• launching new ads

• managing multiple ad accounts simultaneously

• monitoring ad approvals

• relaunching rejected ads

• ensuring campaigns are active

• checking ad account health

• tracking spend

• preparing daily reports

Reporting

At the end of each day you will report:

• ad account spend

• accounts currently active

• any accounts with issues

• creatives performing best

• funding required for the next day

Clear reporting is critical for managing budgets and scaling campaigns.



Skills Required

Ideal candidates should have experience with:

• Meta Ads Manager

• managing multiple ad accounts

• organized campaign deployment

• handling account issues calmly and efficiently

Experience with multi-profile browser environments is helpful.



Work Environment

This role requires someone who is:

• highly organized

• detail-oriented

• proactive when issues arise

• comfortable managing multiple moving parts simultaneously

Advertising environments can change quickly, so the ability to respond quickly and stay organized is important.





Role Summary

This role is responsible for operating the paid advertising infrastructure and ensuring that ad accounts remain live, campaigns continue running, and the system operates smoothly every day.

The goal is simple:

Keep the advertising machine running efficiently and consistently.

title: Senior Amazon Online Arbitrage Product Researcher (Remote – Full Time)
description:
Senior Amazon Online Arbitrage Product Researcher (Remote – Full Time)

We are expanding our Amazon Online Arbitrage team and are looking for an experienced product researcher who knows how to identify profitable opportunities and analyze Amazon listings.

This is a long-term remote position for someone who enjoys analytical work, understands Keepa charts, and wants their performance to directly impact their earnings.

The role includes guaranteed hourly pay, monthly performance bonuses, and longevity bonuses for long-term team members.



What You Will Do

Your primary responsibility will be identifying profitable products that our team can purchase and resell on Amazon.

Daily responsibilities include:

• Sourcing profitable products using Online Arbitrage methods

• Analyzing listings using tools such as Keepa and SellerAmp (SAS)

• Evaluating ROI, profit margin, competition, and price history

• Submitting qualified leads daily and responding to feedback

• Tracking leads using Google Sheets

• Identifying potential risks such as Amazon presence, unstable pricing, or excessive competition

Researchers who consistently identify strong leads are rewarded through performance bonuses.



Required Experience

Applicants must already have hands-on Amazon sourcing experience.

Requirements:

• At least 1.5 years of Amazon Online Arbitrage sourcing experience

• Strong experience using Keepa and SellerAmp (SAS)

• Ability to interpret Keepa charts and evaluate seller competition

• Understanding of ROI, profit calculations, and Amazon pricing behavior

• Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking

• Ability to work independently and meet daily sourcing expectations



Work Schedule

• Full-time: 40 hours per week

• 8 hours per day - work your local hours

• Flexible schedule, but daily leads should be submitted by 8:00 AM Eastern Time

This is intended to be a long-term role with advancement opportunities.



Compensation

Base Pay

• $3.00 per hour guaranteed

Performance Bonuses

• Monthly bonuses based on purchases made from your sourced leads

• High-performing researchers frequently earn $500 – $700+ per month in bonuses



Longevity Bonuses

We reward team members who stay and grow with the company.

• 6 months: $150 bonus

• 1 year: $400 bonus

• 2 years: $800 bonus



Growth Opportunities

Top performers may advance into roles such as:

• Lead Reviewer

• Purchasing Admin

• Team Lead

These roles include greater responsibility and higher compensation.



Qualification Step

To confirm sourcing ability, candidates will complete a short paid qualification step.

• Candidates submit sourcing leads as part of the normal workflow

• Approved leads during this step are paid $10 per approved lead

• Once 5 leads are approved, you immediately move into the full-time role with hourly pay and bonuses



Experienced sourcers typically complete this step very quickly.



Application Instructions

To be considered, please include the following in your application.

Subject line: Senior Amazon Product Researcher Role



In your message include:

• A short summary of your Amazon OA sourcing experience

• The sourcing tools you use (Keepa, SellerAmp, etc.)

Please also confirm the following:

• You understand sourcing performance will be tracked using SellerAmp

• You understand that sharing leads outside the company is strictly prohibited

Sharing leads with others will result in immediate termination, reporting to OnlineJobs.ph, and disqualification from future roles.
