title: Patient Experience Coordinator — Private Dental Practice
description:
About the Role

We are a private dental practice based in London, UK, looking for a reliable, intelligent and professional Patient Experience Coordinator to join our team. This is a long-term role with real growth potential. As we expand across multiple locations and build a wider dental referral network, the right person will grow with the business and take on increasing responsibility over time. You will be the first point of contact for patients — managing calls,
s and messages, coordinating appointments, and ensuring every patient receives a prompt, professional and caring response. Weekend availability is required as part of this role.



What You Will Be Doing



Patient Communication

• Answering inbound patient calls professionally and warmly

• Monitoring and responding to patient
s promptly

• Managing inbound WhatsApp enquiries and converting them to bookings

• Handling patient questions about treatments, pricing and availability

• Following up on missed calls and unbooked enquiries within 2 hours



Appointment & Diary Management

• Booking, rescheduling and cancelling patient appointments

• Liaising with clinical staff and coordinating diaries

• Sending appointment confirmations and reminders

• Chasing unconfirmed appointments to reduce no-shows



New Patient Onboarding

• Sending new patient registration forms and medical history questionnaires

• Chasing incomplete forms before the appointment date

• Ensuring new patient records are set up correctly before the first visit



Treatment Follow-Up

• Following up with patients who received a treatment plan but have not yet booked

• Sending information about payment and finance options where relevant

• Supporting conversion of enquiries into booked treatments



Recall & Retention

• Contacting lapsed patients who have not attended for 6 months or more

• Managing recall lists and tracking responses

• Re-engaging patients who cancelled and did not rebook



Referral Coordination

• Logging and tracking inbound referrals from partner practices and our emergency enquiry network

• Ensuring referred patients are contacted promptly and booked efficiently

• Maintaining an accurate referral log updated in real time



Pre-Appointment Preparation

• Sending directions, parking information and access instructions to all new patients ahead of their first visit

• Confirming the patient knows the duration of their appointment and what to bring

• Sending treatment-specific preparation instructions where relevant — for example fasting requirements before sedation or what to expect before an implant procedure



Payment & Finance

• Explaining finance and payment plan options clearly to patients who enquire about spreading the cost of treatment

• Sending payment links or invoices following treatment as directed

• Logging payments received and flagging any outstanding balances to the practice manager promptly



Post-Treatment Care

• Sending aftercare instructions to patients following their treatment

• Checking in with patients 24–48 hours after complex procedures to ensure they are recovering well

• Logging any post-treatment concerns raised by patients and escalating to the clinician immediately



Complaint Handling

• Taking initial details calmly and professionally when a patient raises a concern or complaint

• Logging the complaint formally and escalating to the practice owner immediately

• Ensuring every patient who raises a concern feels heard and receives a prompt acknowledgement while the matter is being addressed



Emergency Enquiry Handling

•      Triaging emergency dental calls correctly — understanding urgency levels and responding appropriately

•      Following a clear script for patients in acute pain to ensure they are seen promptly or directed to the right resource

•      Logging all emergency enquiries separately to track the volume and performance of the emergency dental referral network



Review Generation

•      Sending a structured follow-up message to every patient within 24 hours of their appointment requesting a Google review

•      Tracking which patients were asked and which left a review in a simple shared spreadsheet

•      Flagging patients who appear dissatisfied before they have the chance to leave a negative review

•      Monitoring
 and Instagram messages and comments and alerting the team to anything requiring a response



Social Media Posting & Management

• Posting one daily story on Instagram using content and direction provided by the team

• Publishing one post per week on Instagram as directed — coordinating with the clinician before and after to obtain content

• Publishing one post per week on
 using approved content

• Publishing one video or post per week on TikTok as directed

• Following up with the clinician before appointments to arrange content capture and after to collect photos or videos for posting

• Scheduling and queuing posts in advance where possible to maintain consistency

• Maintaining a simple monthly content calendar to ensure posting is planned and consistent rather than reactive

• Suggesting content ideas based on treatments, seasonal hooks and trending dental topics

• Ensuring a healthy mix of content types across all platforms — before and after cases, patient testimonials, educational content, promotional offers and behind the scenes

• Replying to every comment on posts promptly and professionally

• Responding to DMs across Instagram,
 and TikTok and directing interested followers to book an appointment

• Following relevant local accounts and engaging with the local community to build profile visibility

• Using relevant location-based and treatment-based hashtags on every post and story

• Tagging the practice location on every post and story across all platforms

• Engaging with trending audio and formats on TikTok to maximise organic reach

• Responding to TikTok comments quickly to take advantage of early engagement windows

• Checking Instagram and
 insights weekly and logging key metrics — follower growth, reach, engagement and enquiries generated

• Producing a brief weekly social media summary report flagging what is working, what is underperforming and suggested adjustments



Lead Tracking & Reporting

• Logging every inbound enquiry with source, date, treatment type and outcome in real time

• Tracking each lead through the pipeline — enquiry, booked, attended, converted or lost

• Producing a simple weekly summary report covering total calls, bookings made, enquiries lost and follow-ups outstanding

• Identifying patterns in missed or unconverted enquiries and flagging to the practice owner



General Administration

• Logging every enquiry accurately in the shared system in real time

• Supporting the practice manager with day-to-day administrative tasks

• Maintaining organised digital records across all platforms



What We Are Looking For

• Excellent spoken and written English — this is non-negotiable

• Warm, professional and empathetic communication style, especially with patients in discomfort or distress

• Previous experience in a customer service, patient care or administrative role

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls

• Comfortable using Google Workspace, WhatsApp,
 and basic CRM or booking systems

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Able to manage multiple tasks and prioritise effectively under pressure

• Dependable, punctual and self-motivated when working remotely

• Available to work some weekend hours as part of the agreed schedule



Nice to Have (Not Essential)

• Experience working with a dental, medical or healthcare practice

• Experience managing inbound calls for a UK-based business

• Experience managing social media accounts including Instagram, TikTok and
 — content planning, posting, engagement and basic performance tracking

• Experience with patient recall or treatment follow-up systems



Hours and Compensation

• 25 hours per week — days and shift pattern to be agreed based on your availability

• Weekend availability is required as part of this role

• Salary: $350–$450 per month USD depending on experience

• Paid monthly via Wise or similar

• Long-term ongoing position with genuine growth potential as the business expands



How to Apply

To be considered, please send the following:

• A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are a great fit for this role — this is mandatory and applications without a recording will not be considered

• Your CV or a summary of your relevant experience

• Your availability across the week, including weekends, and your preferred hours in UK time



Shortlisted candidates will be given a short paid trial task before a final offer is made. We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates proactively and is genuinely committed to delivering an excellent patient experience

title: Video Editor for Health/Wellness VSL Ads (Long-Form)
description:
We are a health and wellness ecommerce brand that sells products through video

   sales letters (VSLs) and short-form video ads on
 and Instagram with AI.



here is inspiration of what we need done. They need to look like how these are structured.











Skills to make AI Avatars such as doctors & ai testimonial's are essential. 



  We need a skilled video editor who can produce high-converting VSL videos and

  short ad creatives mostly with AI on an ongoing basis. You will be given detailed

  shot-by-shot production guides (Word documents) that tell you exactly what to

  put on screen, what the voiceover says, and when to cut. Your job is to bring

  it to life.



  What you will be editing:



  - Long-form VSL videos (20 to 30 minutes) for landing pages

  - Short-form vsls (2 to 5 minutes) for
 and Instagram

  - Hybrid format: AI avatar footage + B-roll stock footage + text overlays +

  subtitles + graphics



  What a typical project looks like:



  - We give you a production guide document with every shot mapped out row by

  row

  - You ai generate or source B-roll 

  - Sync AI-generated avatar clips and voiceover audio we provide

  - Add bold text overlays, subtitles (TikTok caption style), lower thirds,

  and simple motion graphics

  - Add background music ranging from sad to happy (its all explained in the doc)

  - You deliver the final video in 9:16 format 



  Required skills:



  - CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve (CapCut preferred)

  - Experience adding animated text overlays and bold subtitle captions

  - Ability to follow a detailed production document shot by shot

  - Good eye for pacing and fast cuts (2 to 5 second cuts throughout)

  - Basic motion graphics (counters, checkmarks, simple animations)



  

  - Experience editing VSLs, infomercials, or direct response ads with AI avatars & AI B-roll.

  - Experience with health or supplement brand content

  - Familiarity with AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Synthesia



  How we work:



  - We communicate mainly through slack

  - You will receive production guides as Word documents

  - We start with one project as a paid test, then move to ongoing work



  This is a long-term position. We are building multiple brands and will need

  consistent video production for months and years to come. If you do great work

   we will keep you busy.



For each winning ad you create you will get a bonus.



  Please reply with:

  1. A link to your portfolio or 2 to 3 sample videos/vsls you have edited

  3. Your monthly salary expectation for part-time work (15 to 20 hours per

  week)

  4. How soon you can start

title: Female Cold Caller to Match Existing Audio Materials - Real Estate
description:
About the Job

We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on 
 or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi, I’m calling about the property on Thomas Street. Is this the owner?” 



My name is (Your name). I help someone who buys houses in the area. 



Would you ever consider selling that property? 



Okay, thanks for letting me know. 



Can I ask a quick question — is the property currently occupied or vacant? 



What is prompting you to consider selling it? 



Would the property need any repairs or updates?  



That’s helpful. The buyer usually likes to speak directly with owners who may consider selling. 



What would be the best time for him to give you a call? 



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Real Estate Admin / Transaction Coordinator to join our team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience coordinating real estate transactions in California, along with strong administrative skills and familiarity with real estate CRMs and platforms. This role is critical in ensuring smooth transactions from contract to closing.



Applicants must attach a RESUME LINK when applying. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Key Responsibilities:



-Manage real estate transactions from contract to closing, ensuring all paperwork is completed accurately and on time.

-Coordinate with California-based realtors, buyers, sellers, lenders, escrow, and title companies to ensure smooth and compliant transactions.

-Maintain and update CRM tools such as Follow Up Boss, Zillow, and other real estate platforms to track leads, clients, and transaction status.

-Handle document management, compliance checks, and critical deadline tracking to avoid delays or issues.

-Provide timely client follow-ups, appointment scheduling, and professional
 correspondence.

-Assist with listing coordination, including uploading property details, marketing materials, and MLS updates.

-Generate transaction reports and maintain accurate records for auditing and reference purposes.



Qualifications:



-Proven experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator or Admin, specifically handling California transactions.

title: Customer Service Specialist – Luxury E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a full-time Customer Service Specialist to serve as the primary point of contact for our customers. This is a 100% remote role, with working hours from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Friday. You will be helping with order management, returns, and providing high-end styling advice. We need someone who is polished, empathetic, and possesses exceptional written English skills.



Top Responsibilities:

 Management: Respond to customer inquiries in a timely, professional, and "unhurried" brand-aligned manner.

Order Support: Provide accurate updates on order status, shipping timelines, and delivery tracking via Shopify.

Returns Processing: Guide customers through the return and exchange process using Loop Returns.

Styling Guidance: Offer thoughtful, informed styling advice based on a deep understanding of the Auter product range.

Issue Resolution: Manage and resolve customer concerns with empathy and discretion, escalating complex issues when necessary.

Data Integrity: Maintain accurate records of all customer interactions and follow-ups within Shopify.



Requirements:

Must-Have: Previous customer service experience, ideally for a luxury, fashion, or lifestyle brand.

Must-Have: Proficiency with Shopify (navigating orders and customer profiles) and Loop Returns.

Must-Have: Exceptional written English and communication skills with the ability to maintain a sophisticated tone.

Nice-to-Have: Experience with Klaviyo, Desposco, or similar e-commerce fulfillment software.

Nice-to-have: Experience with Website Management.

Trait: High attention to detail and the ability to work independently in a PST timezone.



Perks & Pay:

Pay: $4.00 – $5.00/hour (based on experience).

13th-Month Pay: Included.

Bonuses: Performance-based incentives for high production and revenue impact.

Growth: Opportunity to grow within a high-end, scaling fashion brand.

About Us:

We are a luxury fashion brand dedicated to providing a polished and warm experience for our clientele. We value quality over speed and strive to make every customer interaction feel personal and elevated.



To Apply:

Change the subject line to: “I’m a hard worker [Insert the name of the CEO of Klaviyo]”

(Label this 1.) Why are you interested in this position? (2–3 sentences max)

 (Label this 3.) Can you work 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST hours Monday–Friday?

title: Ecommerce Assistant
description:
Applicants must score in the 90th percentile or higher on the test below to be considered for the position. If you are a high caliber professional who has what it takes, we want to work with you! The test takes about 30 minutes and we are willing to pay for excellence. 




/s/vd2hv2cq



MORE ABOUT THE ROLE: 



You'll be the operational backbone of our business and take ownership over your domain of work.

You'll handle everything from customer communication and supplier coordination to QuickBooks invoicing, product research, Shopify catalog management, and documentation creation. You'll also manage our social media presence (~1 hour daily), keeping our brand active and engaging across platforms. You'll manage timelines, track tasks, anticipate needs, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

In 6 months, you'll likely be managing a small virtual team and taking on higher-level operational projects. In 12 months, you could be leading entire operational domains with significantly higher compensation.



What You'll Actually Do



- Support daily operations across customer service, vendor coordination, and order management

- Manage product sourcing, procurement research, and catalog updates (Shopify, Amazon, eBay)

- Handle QuickBooks invoicing and transaction support

- Manage social media accounts — daily posting, engagement, and community management (~1 hour/day)

- Coordinate team communication, track hours, and manage internal workflows

- Create and maintain SOPs, documentation, and process systems

- Use tools like Notion, ShipStation, Google Workspace, Clockify, and BitWarden

- Anticipate problems before they happen and solve them before they're asked

- Handle whatever else needs handling—because in a growing company, priorities shift fast





Who You Are

Non-Negotiables:

- 2+ years of virtual assistant experience (ecommerce experience is a major plus)

- Exceptional English — writing, speaking, and comprehension at a native or near-native level

- Available to work EST business hours full-time (40 hrs/week)

- Proactive critical thinker — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Relentless problem solver — "no" is just the beginning of the conversation

- Highly intelligent and detail-obsessed — nothing gets past you

- Outstanding customer service skills — you communicate with clarity and care

- Social media savvy — you know how to create engaging content and build community



What Sets You Apart:



You've used QuickBooks, Shopify, or ecommerce platforms before

You've managed social media for a business (not just personal accounts)

You're tech-savvy and learn new tools quickly

You thrive in fast-paced environments where no two days are the same

You take ownership like it's your own business

You want to be challenged, not coddled





Why Work Here?



Most VA jobs treat you like a task robot. We treat you like a strategic partner.

- Growth Path: Manage a team within 6 months. Grow your responsibilities and compensation as you prove yourself.

- High-Caliber Team: Work alongside sharp, driven people who will push you to level up.

- Real Impact: Your work directly affects business outcomes. You'll see the results of your decisions.

- Investment in You: We want to develop your skills, challenge your thinking, and help you become exceptional at what you do.

- Meritocracy: Performance = opportunity. We reward excellence, not seniority.



Details



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours/week), EST business hours

Compensation: $6–8/hour USD depending on experience

Location: Remote (Philippines-based candidates only)

Start Date: ASAP

title: SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGER
description:
Job Title: Supply Chain Assistant (Shopify Dropshipping) – Part Time



We are looking for a detail-oriented Supply Chain Assistant to join our team and help manage order issues for our Shopify dropshipping stores. Your main responsibility will be to ensure that all orders are fulfilled correctly, suppliers are followed up with, and customers receive updates when necessary.



This role is important for keeping our operations running smoothly and ensuring a good customer experience.



Position Details:

Part-time position

$4 per hour

Remote work



Main Responsibilities:



• Monitor all Shopify orders daily and ensure they are fulfilled within the correct timeframe

• Identify and resolve order issues such as out-of-stock items, variant issues, or supplier delays

• Communicate with suppliers to follow up on unfulfilled or delayed orders

• Track shipments using Parcel Panel and update the order status when needed

• Send
s to customers regarding order issues using provided templates

• Process refunds when necessary and keep records updated in the tracking sheet

• Update internal Google Sheets that track open orders, order issues, and inventory

• Make sure no order remains unresolved or unfulfilled without being tracked in the system

• Perform quality checks on products together with the supplier to ensure items match the listing and meet our standards

• Work with the supplier to learn product details, sizes, and variants so issues can be handled quickly

• Help identify products that may need updates or corrections in the store

• Report daily updates on open orders, issues resolved, and tasks completed



Requirements:



• Good written English communication

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow SOPs and structured workflows

• Comfortable working with Google Sheets

• Experience with Shopify or ecommerce is a plus (but not required)

• Ability to work independently and stay organized



Tools we use:



• Shopify

• Parcel Panel (tracking)

• Google Sheets

• Supplier communication platforms



Important:

When applying, please start your message with the word strawberry so we know you carefully read the job description.



We are looking for someone reliable who wants to grow with the team and learn more about ecommerce operations.
